build_method_en: Constructed based on China's Gaokao exam questions from 2010 to 2022 through a combination of automated scripts and manual annotation
intro_en: GaokaoBench is an intuitive evaluation benchmark that uses Chinese Gaokao exam questions from 2010 to 2022 to assess large language models. The benchmark includes 1,781 objective questions and 1,030 subjective questions, covering nine science and humanities subjects. It employs a zero-shot setting combined with human scoring to comprehensively evaluate models' language understanding, logical reasoning, and generation abilities.

name: GaRAGe
intro: GaRAGe是一个大型RAG基准，包含人工整理的长篇答案及每个依据段落的注释，支持细粒度评估LLM在生成RAG答案时识别相关依据的能力。该基准涵盖2366个多样化问题，包含3.5万多条来自私有文档和网络的注释段落，反映真实RAG应用场景。
metric: Relevance-Aware Factuality Score, F1 in attribution, true positive rate in deflections
intro_en: GaRAGe is a large-scale RAG benchmark featuring manually curated long-form answers and annotated supporting paragraphs for each, enabling fine-grained evaluation of LLMs' ability to identify relevant evidence when generating RAG answers. The benchmark includes 2,366 diverse questions and over 35,000 annotated paragraphs from private documents and the web, reflecting real-world RAG application scenarios.

name: GDPVal
intro: GDPval是一个评估AI模型在真实世界中具有经济价值任务表现的基准测试。它涵盖了美国劳工统计局针对44个职业的大部分工作活动，这些职业来自对美国GDP贡献最大的9个行业。任务是根据平均拥有14年经验的行业专业人士的代表性工作构建的。该基准测试还提供了一个包含220个任务的黄金子集和公共自动化评分服务。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
eval_feature: 思维链, 零样本, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Chain of Thought, Zero-shot, Process Evaluation
intro_en: GDPVal is a benchmark for evaluating AI models' performance on economically valuable tasks in the real world. It covers most work activities for 44 occupations from the 9 industries contributing most to the US GDP, based on data from the US Bureau of Labor Statistics. Tasks are constructed to represent work performed by industry professionals with an average of 14 years of experience. The benchmark also provides a gold subset of 220 tasks and a public automated scoring service.

name: GEdit-Bench
intro: GEdit-Bench是一个基于真实世界用户指令的图像编辑评测基准。它旨在提供一个更真实、更全面的评估框架，以衡量图像编辑模型的性能。该基准的发布旨在缩小开源模型与领先的闭源模型（如GPT-4o和Gemini）在图像编辑能力上的差距。
intro_en: GEdit-Bench is an image editing evaluation benchmark based on real-world user instructions. It aims to provide a more realistic and comprehensive framework for assessing the performance of image editing models. The benchmark is released to narrow the gap in image editing capabilities between open-source models and leading closed-source models such as GPT-4o and Gemini.

name: GMAI-MMBench
intro: GMAI-MMBench是一个全面的通用医疗AI基准，旨在评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在各种医疗应用中的有效性。该基准解决了现有基准在临床相关性、评估不完整性和交互式LVLMs指导不足等方面的局限性。它由284个数据集构建，涵盖38种医学图像模态、18项临床相关任务、18个科室和4种感知粒度，采用视觉问答（VQA）形式。
org: Shanghai AI Laboratory, University of Washington, Monash University, East China Normal University, U
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Dynamic updating, contamination prevention, process evaluation
intro_en: GMAI-MMBench is a comprehensive general medical AI benchmark designed to evaluate the effectiveness of large vision-language models (LVLMs) across various medical applications. It addresses limitations of existing benchmarks in clinical relevance, incomplete evaluation, and insufficient guidance for interactive LVLMs. The benchmark is built from 284 datasets, covering 38 medical image modalities, 18 clinically relevant tasks, 18 departments, and 4 levels of perceptual granularity, using a visual question answering (VQA) format.

name: GPQA
intro: GPQA包含448个由领域专家编写的生物、物理和化学多项选择题，设计为“谷歌难题”，难以被熟练非专家和先进AI系统解答。旨在促进可扩展监督研究，帮助专家从超越人类能力的AI系统中获得真实信息。
org: New York University, Google DeepMind, Cohere
intro_en: GPQA contains 448 multiple-choice questions in biology, physics, and chemistry, written by domain experts and designed as "Google-proof" problems that are difficult for skilled non-experts and advanced AI systems to solve. It aims to promote scalable supervision research and help experts obtain reliable information from AI systems that surpass human capabilities.

name: GPQA Diamond
intro: GPQA Diamond是GPQA (Graduate-Level Google-Proof Q&A) 基准的一个精选子集，包含198个由领域专家验证的最高质量问题。这些问题涵盖物理、化学和生物学等研究生级别的科学领域，被广泛用于评估大型语言模型的高级科学推理能力。
intro_en: GPQA Diamond is a curated subset of the GPQA (Graduate-Level Google-Proof Q&A) benchmark, containing 198 highest-quality questions verified by domain experts. These questions cover graduate-level scientific fields such as physics, chemistry, and biology, and are widely used to evaluate the advanced scientific reasoning abilities of large language models.

name: GraphWalks
intro: GraphWalks是一个多跳推理长上下文基准测试。在该基准测试中，模型会获得一个以边列表表示的图，并被要求执行特定操作。模型需要根据图的结构和操作描述，返回操作结果中的节点集合，例如执行广度优先搜索（BFS）或查找节点的父节点。
intro_en: GraphWalks is a multi-hop reasoning long-context benchmark. In this benchmark, the model is given a graph represented by an edge list and is required to perform specific operations. The model must return the set of nodes resulting from the operation based on the graph structure and operation description, such as performing breadth-first search (BFS) or finding a node's parent.

name: GSM8K
intro: GSM8K是一个包含8500个高质量、语言多样的小学数学应用题的数据集，旨在诊断和评估大型语言模型在多步数学推理方面的能力。尽管这些问题在概念上相对简单，但即便是最大规模的Transformer模型也难以在该基准上取得高分。
intro_en: GSM8K is a dataset of 8,500 high-quality, linguistically diverse elementary math word problems designed to diagnose and evaluate large language models' abilities in multi-step mathematical reasoning. Although these problems are conceptually simple, even the largest Transformer models struggle to achieve high scores on this benchmark.

name: HalluEval
intro: HalluEval是一个用于评估大型语言模型幻觉的大规模基准。它包含约35000个带有人工标注的生成样本，涵盖了通用、问答、对话和摘要等多种场景。该基准旨在全面评估和分析大型语言模型在识别和避免生成不真实或与来源不符内容方面的能力。
org: Renmin University of China, Université de Montréal, Hugging Face
intro_en: HalluEval is a large-scale benchmark for evaluating hallucinations in large language models. It contains approximately 35,000 human-annotated generated samples across various scenarios, including general tasks, QA, dialogue, and summarization. The benchmark aims to comprehensively assess and analyze large language models' ability to identify and avoid generating false or source-inconsistent content.

name: HalluLens
intro: HalluLens是一个用于评估大型语言模型幻觉的综合基准。它提出了一个清晰的幻觉分类法，区分了与训练数据不一致的外源性幻觉和与输入上下文不一致的内源性幻觉。该基准包含动态生成的测试集以防止数据泄漏，并引入了新的外源性幻觉任务，旨在为模型的事实性和一致性评估提供标准化框架。
org: FAIR at Meta, GenAI at Meta, HKUST
metric: Hallucinated when not refused, Correct answer rate, False acceptance rate
task_type: 开放式问答、生成、事实验证、分类、安全测试
eval_feature: 动态/实时、防污染、对抗性
task_type_en: Open-domain question answering, generation, fact verification, classification, security testing
intro_en: HalluLens is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating hallucinations in large language models. It proposes a clear hallucination taxonomy, distinguishing exogenous hallucinations inconsistent with training data from endogenous hallucinations inconsistent with input context. The benchmark includes dynamically generated test sets to prevent data leakage and introduces new exogenous hallucination tasks, aiming to provide a standardized framework for assessing model factuality and consistency.

name: HalluQA
intro: HalluQA是针对中文大型语言模型幻觉现象的问答基准。它包含450个跨越多个领域的精心设计的对抗性问题，特别考虑了中国的历史文化、风俗习惯和社会现象。该基准在构建过程中区分了模仿性虚假和事实性错误两种幻觉类型，并基于GLM-130B和ChatGPT构建了对抗性样本。
build_method: 人工标注、专家构建、LLM生成
task_type: 开放式问答、事实验证、选择题
task_type_en: Open-domain question answering, fact verification, multiple-choice questions
build_method_en: Manual annotation, expert construction, LLM generation
intro_en: HalluQA is a question-answering benchmark targeting hallucination phenomena in Chinese large language models. It contains 450 carefully designed adversarial questions across multiple domains, with special consideration of Chinese history, culture, customs, and social phenomena. The benchmark distinguishes between imitative falsehoods and factual errors as two types of hallucinations and constructs adversarial samples based on GLM-130B and ChatGPT.

name: HallusionBench
intro: HallusionBench是一个全面的基准测试，旨在评估图像-上下文推理能力。该基准测试通过强调对视觉数据的细致理解和解释，对先进的大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）提出了重大挑战。它包含346张图像和1129个问题，全部由人类专家精心制作。通过新颖的视觉问题结构和对照组设计，HallusionBench能够对模型的响应趋势、逻辑一致性和各种故障模式进行定量分析，并深入理解语言幻觉和视觉错觉等问题。
org: University of Maryland, University of California, Beijing Institute of Technology, Tencent AI Lab, C
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
metric: Accuracy, Question Pair Acc, Figure Acc, Easy Question Acc, Hard Question Acc
modality: 图像, 文本, 多模态
eval_feature: 防污染, 对抗性, 过程评估
intro_en: HallusionBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate image-context reasoning abilities. By emphasizing detailed understanding and interpretation of visual data, it poses significant challenges to advanced large vision-language models (LVLMs). It includes 346 images and 1,129 questions, all carefully crafted by human experts. Through novel visual question structures and control group designs, HallusionBench enables quantitative analysis of model response patterns, logical consistency, and various failure modes, providing deep insights into issues such as language hallucination and visual illusions.

name: HarmBench
intro: HarmBench是一个用于自动化红队测试的标准化评估框架，旨在解决以往评估大型语言模型（LLM）恶意使用风险时缺乏统一标准的问题。该框架在设计时考虑了多个关键属性，并通过对18种红队方法和33个目标模型及防御策略的大规模比较，得出了新的见解。HarmBench的开源促进了攻击和防御方法的协同发展。
org: Center for AI Safety, University of California Berkeley, Stanford University, University of Illinois
metric: Attack Success Rate (ASR), GCG, GCG-M, GCG-T, PEZ, GBDA, UAT, AP, SFS, ZS, PAIR, TAP, TAP-T, AutoDAN
intro_en: HarmBench is a standardized evaluation framework for automated red teaming, designed to address the lack of unified standards in assessing the malicious use risks of large language models (LLMs). The framework incorporates multiple key attributes and provides new insights through a large-scale comparison of 18 red teaming methods and 33 target models and defense strategies. The open-source nature of HarmBench promotes the collaborative development of attack and defense methods.

name: HEAD-QA
intro: HEAD-QA是基于西班牙医疗系统专业资格考试的多项选择问答基准，涵盖医学、护理学、心理学、化学、药学和生物学六个领域，对人类专家也极具挑战性。
build_method: 人工收集，来自西班牙医疗专业资格考试
eval_feature: 复杂推理，跨语言能力，专业资格考试难度
build_method_en: Manual collection, from the Spanish medical professional qualification examination
eval_feature_en: Complex reasoning, cross-lingual ability, professional qualification exam difficulty
intro_en: HEAD-QA is a multiple-choice question benchmark based on the Spanish healthcare system professional qualification exam, covering six fields: medicine, nursing, psychology, chemistry, pharmacy, and biology. It is highly challenging even for human experts.

name: HealthBench
intro: HealthBench是一个开源基准，用于衡量大型语言模型在医疗领域的性能和安全性。它包含5000个多轮对话，由262名医生基于48562条独特评分标准进行评估，涵盖多种健康场景和行为维度。该基准支持模型在紧急情况、临床数据转换及全球健康等场景下的开放式真实评测。
intro_en: HealthBench is an open-source benchmark designed to evaluate the performance and safety of large language models in the medical field. It includes 5,000 multi-turn dialogues assessed by 262 doctors based on 48,562 unique scoring criteria, covering various health scenarios and behavioral dimensions. The benchmark supports open-ended real-world evaluation of models in emergency situations, clinical data transformation, and global health contexts.

name: HealthSearchQA
intro: HealthSearchQA是Google在MultiMedQA论文中新引入的自由回答医学问题数据集，包含3173个来自健康搜索引擎的消费者医疗问题，旨在评估大型语言模型在真实用户健康查询场景中的表现。
build_method: 自动生成，来自健康搜索引擎查询
eval_feature: 评估LLM在消费者健康查询场景中的知识和推理能力
build_method_en: Automatically generated, from health search engine queries
eval_feature_en: Evaluating LLMs' knowledge and reasoning abilities in consumer health query scenarios
intro_en: HealthSearchQA is a free-response medical question dataset newly introduced by Google in the MultiMedQA paper. It contains 3,173 consumer health questions from health search engines and aims to evaluate large language models' performance in real-world user health query scenarios.

name: HellaSwag
intro: HellaSwag是一个常识推理挑战数据集。人类在该数据集上的准确率超过95%，但先进的语言模型得分却很低。该数据集通过对抗性过滤（Adversarial Filtering）方法构建，旨在生成对机器而言极具挑战性、但对人类来说却很简单的句子补全问题。
org: University of Washington, Allen Institute for AI
intro_en: HellaSwag is a commonsense reasoning challenge dataset. Humans achieve over 95% accuracy on it, while advanced language models score much lower. The dataset is constructed using Adversarial Filtering to create sentence completion tasks that are very challenging for machines but easy for humans.

name: HELMET
intro: HELMET是一个全面的基准测试，旨在有效且彻底地评估长上下文语言模型（LCLMs）。它涵盖了七个多样化的、以应用为中心的类别，解决了现有基准测试中存在的覆盖范围有限、上下文长度不足和评估指标不可靠等问题。HELMET通过增加可控的上下文长度（高达128K tokens）、基于模型的评估和少样本提示，提供了更可靠和一致的LCLM排名。研究发现，合成任务不能可靠预测下游性能，且HELMET中不同类别之间趋势各异、相关性低。
metric: Accuracy, Pass@k, F1, BLEU, Win Rate, Success Rate
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题, 摘要, 信息检索, 文本生成
eval_feature: 思维链, 零样本, 过程评估
task_type_en: Open-ended question answering, multiple choice, summarization, information retrieval, text generation
eval_feature_en: Chain of Thought, Zero-shot, Process Evaluation
intro_en: HELMET is a comprehensive benchmark designed to effectively and thoroughly evaluate long-context language models (LCLMs). It covers seven diverse, application-focused categories, addressing limitations in existing benchmarks such as limited coverage, insufficient context length, and unreliable evaluation metrics. HELMET offers more reliable and consistent LCLM rankings by incorporating controllable context lengths (up to 128K tokens), model-based evaluation, and few-shot prompting. Studies show that synthetic tasks do not reliably predict downstream performance, and trends vary with low correlation across different categories within HELMET.

name: HiPhO
intro: HiPhO基准测试通过高中物理奥林匹克竞赛题目评估(M)LLM的物理能力。它包含13套最新的奥林匹克竞赛试题，涵盖从纯文本到图表题的混合模态。该基准测试采用官方评分方案进行答案和步骤级别的细粒度评分，并根据官方奖牌阈值向模型授予金、银、铜牌，以便与人类参赛者进行直接比较。
org: Shanghai AI Lab, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen
build_method: 考试题改编, 人工标注
metric: Exam score, Gold, Silver, Bronze medals
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题
eval_feature: 过程评估, 人机对比, 多模态
intro_en: The HiPhO benchmark evaluates (M)LLMs' physics abilities using high school physics Olympiad problems. It includes 13 sets of the latest Olympiad questions, covering mixed modalities from pure text to graphical problems. The benchmark applies the official scoring scheme for fine-grained evaluation at both answer and solution step levels, awarding gold, silver, and bronze medals to models based on official medal thresholds for direct comparison with human participants.

name: HLE
intro: Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) 是一个前沿的多模态基准，旨在评估高级AI系统在人类知识前沿的表现。该基准包含2500个由全球主题专家创建的选择题和简答题，覆盖数学、人文学科和自然科学等多个领域。HLE的设计目标是成为同类中最后一个封闭式学术基准，其问题无法通过简单的网络搜索快速解答，从而对当前最先进的LLM构成重大挑战。
org: Center for AI Safety and collaborating institutions
build_method: 由全球各领域的专家构建
eval_feature: 防污染、零样本、少样本、领域特定
build_method_en: Built by experts from various fields worldwide
intro_en: Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) is a cutting-edge multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate advanced AI systems' performance at the forefront of human knowledge. It includes 2,500 multiple-choice and short-answer questions created by global subject experts, covering fields such as mathematics, humanities, and natural sciences. HLE aims to be the last closed-book academic benchmark of its kind, with questions that cannot be quickly answered through simple web searches, posing a significant challenge to state-of-the-art LLMs.

name: HLE-Verified
intro: HLE-Verified是“人类最后考试”（HLE）基准的修订和验证版本。它通过实施透明的验证协议，解决了原始HLE中存在噪声项目的问题。该过程涉及专家审查和基于模型的交叉检查，以验证并在必要时修复有缺陷的问题和答案，最终提高基准在评估大型语言模型方面的可靠性。
build_method: 专家审查、模型交叉检查和独立专家修复
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
build_method_en: Expert review, model cross-check, and independent expert remediation
intro_en: HLE-Verified is a revised and validated version of the "Human Last Exam" (HLE) benchmark. It addresses the noisy items in the original HLE by implementing a transparent verification protocol. This process involves expert review and model-based cross-checking to validate and, when necessary, correct flawed questions and answers, ultimately enhancing the benchmark's reliability in evaluating large language models.

name: HR-Bench
intro: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在处理高分辨率（HR）图像的复杂细节方面仍面临挑战。HR-Bench是首个专门设计用于严格评估MLLM在4K和8K图像上性能的基准。该研究提出了一种名为Divide, Conquer and Combine (DC^2)的无训练框架，旨在增强MLLM对HR图像的感知能力。实验表明，DC^2显著提升了MLLM在HR图像基准上的表现。
org: Wuhan University, The University of Sydney, Jiangsu University, Sun Yat-Sen University, Nanyang Tech
intro_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) still face challenges in handling complex details of high-resolution (HR) images. HR-Bench is the first benchmark specifically designed to rigorously evaluate MLLM performance on 4K and 8K images. This study proposes a training-free framework called Divide, Conquer and Combine (DC²) to enhance MLLM perception of HR images. Experiments show that DC² significantly improves MLLM performance on the HR image benchmark.

name: HumanEval
intro: HumanEval 是由OpenAI开发的一个评测基准，旨在衡量大型语言模型（LLM）在代码生成方面的能力。该基准包含了164个手写的编程问题，每个问题都提供了函数签名、文档字符串和单元测试，用以检验生成代码的函数正确性。
intro_en: HumanEval, developed by OpenAI, is a benchmark designed to evaluate the code generation capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It consists of 164 handcrafted programming problems, each providing a function signature, docstring, and unit tests to verify the correctness of the generated code.

name: Humanity’s Last Code Exam
intro: Humanity’s Last Code Exam (HLCE) 是一个极具挑战性的代码生成基准，收录了2010年至2024年间ICPC世界总决赛和IOI的235道最难题。该基准旨在评估大型语言模型的高级推理和代码生成能力，并提供了一个可复现的沙箱环境用于评测。此外，它还引入了“自我认知”任务来衡量模型对其自身能力的认知水平。
org: University of Science and Technology of China, Huawei Noah's Ark Lab
intro_en: Humanity’s Last Code Exam (HLCE) is a highly challenging code generation benchmark featuring 235 of the toughest problems from the ICPC World Finals and IOI between 2010 and 2024. It aims to evaluate large language models' advanced reasoning and code generation abilities and provides a reproducible sandbox environment for testing. Additionally, it introduces a "self-awareness" task to measure models' understanding of their own capabilities.

name: Humanity’s Last Exam (HLE)
intro: 人类的终极考试 (HLE) 是一个多模态基准测试，旨在衡量大型语言模型 (LLM) 在人类知识前沿的能力。该基准包含2500道跨数学、人文和自然科学等数十个科目的问题，由全球主题专家开发。HLE的问题设计独特，具有明确且易于验证的已知答案，但无法通过互联网快速检索。目前最先进的LLM在该基准上表现出较低的准确性和校准度，这突显了当前LLM能力与人类专家水平之间的显著差距。
task_type_en: Multiple choice questions, short answer questions
intro_en: Humanity’s Last Exam (HLE) is a multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate large language models’ (LLM) capabilities at the frontier of human knowledge. It includes 2,500 questions across dozens of subjects such as mathematics, humanities, and natural sciences, developed by global domain experts. HLE’s questions are uniquely designed with clear, verifiable known answers that cannot be quickly retrieved from the internet. State-of-the-art LLMs currently show low accuracy and calibration on this benchmark, highlighting a significant gap between their abilities and human expert levels.

name: IFBench
intro: IFBench评估语言模型遵循精确指令的泛化能力，特别是面对陌生输出约束。包含58个新颖且难度较高的可验证域外约束，并提出基于可验证奖励的强化学习方法提升指令执行。
org: Allen Institute for AI, University of Washington
scale: 58个约束，约300个单轮提示，约1300个多轮样本
intro_en: IFBench evaluates language models' ability to generalize in following precise instructions, especially when facing unfamiliar output constraints. It includes 58 novel and challenging verifiable out-of-domain constraints and proposes a reinforcement learning method based on verifiable rewards to improve instruction execution.

name: IFEval
intro: IFEval是一个评估大型语言模型遵循自然语言指令能力的基准，解决了人工评测成本高和自动评测偏差问题。包含约500个带有可验证指令（如字数或关键词要求）的提示，实现客观评估。
intro_en: IFEval is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' ability to follow natural language instructions, addressing high costs of human evaluation and biases in automatic evaluation. It includes about 500 prompts with verifiable instructions (e.g., word count or keyword requirements) to enable objective assessment.

name: IMO-AnswerBench
intro: IMO-AnswerBench是一个高级数学推理基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型在国际数学奥林匹克竞赛级别问题上的表现。它包含400个多样化的奥林匹克问题，这些问题具有可验证的简短答案。该基准测试在推动模型数学推理能力方面发挥了关键作用。
intro_en: IMO-AnswerBench is an advanced mathematical reasoning benchmark designed to evaluate large language models on International Mathematical Olympiad-level problems. It contains 400 diverse Olympiad questions with verifiable short answers. This benchmark plays a key role in advancing models' mathematical reasoning abilities.

name: INCLUDE
intro: Include是一个综合性的、以知识和推理为中心的基准测试，旨在评估多语言大型语言模型在不同区域和文化背景下的表现。该基准测试包含197,243个问答对，来源于44种书面语言的本地考试资源，以解决现有评估资源不足和翻译偏差的问题。它通过收集特定国家的教育、专业和职业执照考试，确保了对区域知识和文化细微差别的准确反映，从而促进了多语言LLM在实际语言环境中的有效部署。
org: EPFL, Cohere For AI, Cohere For AI Community, ETH Zurich, Swiss AI Initiative
build_method: 人工标注, 考试题改编
intro_en: Include is a comprehensive, knowledge- and reasoning-centered benchmark designed to evaluate multilingual large language models across different regions and cultural contexts. It contains 197,243 QA pairs sourced from native exam materials in 44 written languages, addressing the limitations of existing evaluation resources and translation biases. By collecting education, professional, and licensing exams specific to each country, it ensures accurate representation of regional knowledge and cultural nuances, promoting effective deployment of multilingual LLMs in real-world language settings.

name: InfiniteBench
intro: InfiniteBench是首个平均数据长度超过10万标记的大语言模型（LLM）基准。它涵盖了合成与真实世界的任务，涉及多个领域，并同时支持英文和中文。该基准测试中的任务旨在要求模型对上下文中的长距离依赖关系有深入的理解，仅仅从上下文中检索有限的段落不足以完成这些任务。
build_method: 混合、自动生成、专家构建
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答, 代码生成, 数学问题, 文本摘要
task_type_en: Multiple choice, open-ended questions, code generation, math problems, text summarization
intro_en: InfiniteBench is the first large language model (LLM) benchmark with an average data length exceeding 100,000 tokens. It covers both synthetic and real-world tasks across multiple domains and supports both English and Chinese. The tasks in this benchmark require models to deeply understand long-range dependencies in the context; retrieving only limited paragraphs from the context is insufficient to complete these tasks.

name: InfoVQA
intro: InfographicVQA是一个用于信息图表视觉问答的新数据集。它包含多样化的信息图表、自然语言问题和答案标注。该数据集旨在评估模型对文档布局、文本内容、图形元素和数据可视化进行联合推理的能力，并侧重于需要基本推理和算术技能的问题。
org: Wadhwani AI, International Institute of Information Technology Hyderabad, Indian Institute of Scienc
build_method: 人工标注, 网络爬取
intro_en: InfographicVQA is a new dataset for visual question answering on infographics. It includes diverse infographics, natural language questions, and annotated answers. The dataset aims to evaluate models' ability to jointly reason over document layout, textual content, graphical elements, and data visualization, focusing on questions requiring basic reasoning and arithmetic skills.

name: Inverse IFEval
intro: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在处理与训练范式冲突的指令时表现出认知惯性。Inverse IFEval基准旨在评估LLMs克服训练偏见并遵循对抗性指令的能力。该基准包含八种挑战类型，涵盖23个领域，通过人机协作流程构建了1012个高质量的中英文问题，并采用LLM-as-a-Judge框架进行评估。
org: ByteDance Seed, Nanjing University, Peking University, Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunica
intro_en: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit cognitive inertia when handling instructions that conflict with their training paradigms. The Inverse IFEval benchmark aims to assess LLMs' ability to overcome training biases and follow adversarial instructions. It includes eight challenge types across 23 domains, featuring 1,012 high-quality Chinese and English questions created through a human-AI collaborative process, and is evaluated using the LLM-as-a-Judge framework.

name: JailBench
intro: JailBench是首个针对中文环境设计的LLM深层安全漏洞评测基准，采用细化的分层安全分类体系和创新的自动越狱提示工程框架（AJPE）构建。该基准面向《网络安全技术 生成式人工智能服务安全基本要求》的训练数据及生成内容的主要安全风险标准分类设计，是目前公开发布的题库规模最大、越狱攻击手段覆盖最为广泛的中文评测数据集。
build_method: 网络资源搜集、人工整理编写、大模型辅助生成
build_method_en: Network resource collection, manual compilation and writing, large model-assisted generation
intro_en: JailBench is the first LLM deep security vulnerability benchmark designed for the Chinese environment. It is built using a refined hierarchical security classification system and an innovative Automatic Jailbreak Prompt Engineering framework (AJPE). This benchmark is designed based on the main security risk classification standards for training data and generated content outlined in the "Cybersecurity Technology Basic Security Requirements for Generative AI Services." It is currently the largest publicly released Chinese evaluation dataset in terms of question bank size and the most comprehensive in coverage of jailbreak attack methods.

name: JailJudge
intro: JailJudge是一个用于全面评估大型语言模型（LLM）抵御越狱攻击能力的基准。它包含了合成、对抗性、真实世界和多语言等多种风险场景，并配备了高质量的人工标注数据集。该基准还引入了一个多智能体框架，以提供可解释的细粒度评分，并推出了一个端到端的评判模型JAILJUDGE Guard。
org: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
build_method: 人工标注, 自动生成, 混合
metric: Accuracy, Attack Success Rate (ASR), F1 Score
language: 英文, 中文, 多语言
intro_en: JailJudge is a benchmark for comprehensively evaluating large language models' (LLM) resistance to jailbreak attacks. It includes various risk scenarios such as synthetic, adversarial, real-world, and multilingual, accompanied by a high-quality human-annotated dataset. The benchmark also introduces a multi-agent framework for interpretable fine-grained scoring and launches an end-to-end evaluation model, JAILJUDGE Guard.

name: K-QA
intro: K-QA是一个真实世界的医疗问答基准，旨在解决大型语言模型在临床环境中提供准确回复的关键挑战。该数据集包含1,212个源自K Health（一个AI驱动的临床平台）真实对话的患者问题。通过内部医生团队对问题进行回答和手动分解，并提出了两种基于NLI的评估指标：全面性和幻觉率，用于评估生成答案的准确性。K-QA可用于促进医学NLP应用的研究。
intro_en: K-QA is a real-world medical question answering benchmark designed to address the key challenge of providing accurate responses by large language models in clinical settings. The dataset contains 1,212 patient questions sourced from real conversations on K Health, an AI-driven clinical platform. An internal team of physicians answered and manually decomposed the questions, and two NLI-based evaluation metrics—comprehensiveness and hallucination rate—were proposed to assess the accuracy of generated answers. K-QA can be used to advance research in medical NLP applications.

name: KORBench
intro: KOR-Bench是一个旨在评估大型语言模型在知识正交推理任务上表现的基准测试。它通过最小化对领域特定知识的依赖，更准确地评估模型在分布外设置中的推理能力。该基准测试包含操作、逻辑、密码、谜题和反事实五种任务类别，强调模型应用新规则描述来解决新规则驱动问题的有效性。KOR-Bench旨在增强推理评估并支持该领域的进一步研究。
org: Multimodal Art Projection Research Community, ByteDance.Inc, 01.AI, 2077.AI, Tongji University, Écol
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: KOR-Bench is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' performance on knowledge-orthogonal reasoning tasks. By minimizing reliance on domain-specific knowledge, it more accurately assesses models' reasoning abilities in out-of-distribution settings. The benchmark includes five task categories: operations, logic, cryptography, puzzles, and counterfactuals, emphasizing the models' effectiveness in applying new rule descriptions to solve rule-driven problems. KOR-Bench aims to enhance reasoning evaluation and support further research in this field.

name: L-V-Eval
intro: L-V-Eval是一个具有五个长度等级（16k至256k词）的长上下文基准。包含单跳和多跳问答两大任务，涉及11个双语数据集。通过插入混淆事实和关键词替换等技术，更客观地评估大型语言模型的长上下文处理能力。
org: Infinigence AI, Tsinghua University, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai Jiao Tong Univers
intro_en: L-V-Eval is a long-context benchmark with five length levels (16k to 256k tokens). It includes single-hop and multi-hop QA tasks across 11 bilingual datasets. Techniques like inserting distracting facts and keyword replacement are used to more objectively evaluate large language models' long-context processing abilities.

name: LAB-Bench
intro: LAB-Bench是一个用于评估AI系统在生物学研究中实际能力的大型基准测试。它包含2400多个多项选择题，涵盖了文献回顾、图表解读、数据库访问和DNA/蛋白质序列操作等任务。该基准旨在评估语言模型在科学研究工作流中的表现，并作为开发自动化研究系统的有用工具。
intro_en: LAB-Bench is a large benchmark designed to evaluate AI systems' practical capabilities in biological research. It includes over 2,400 multiple-choice questions covering tasks such as literature review, chart interpretation, database access, and DNA/protein sequence manipulation. The benchmark aims to assess language models' performance in scientific research workflows and serves as a useful tool for developing automated research systems.

name: LifelongAgentBench
intro: LifelongAgentBench是首个统一基准，系统评估大型语言模型智能体的终身学习能力。涵盖数据库、操作系统和知识图谱三大交互环境，支持自动标签验证、可复现性和模块化扩展。
org: South China University of Technology, MBZUAI, Chinese Academy of Sciences, East China Normal Univers
scale: 22 SQL skills, 29 Bash skills, and SPARQL tasks
intro_en: LifelongAgentBench is the first unified benchmark that systematically evaluates the lifelong learning ability of large language model agents. It covers three interactive environments: databases, operating systems, and knowledge graphs, supporting automatic label verification, reproducibility, and modular extensibility.

name: LingoQA
intro: LingoQA是一个针对自动驾驶领域视觉问答的新型数据集和基准。该数据集包含2.8万个独特的短视频场景和41.9万个标注。对最先进的视觉语言模型进行评估表明，它们的性能仍低于人类水平。LingoQA引入了一个名为Lingo-Judge的真实性分类器，其与人类评估的Spearman相关系数达到0.95，超越了现有技术。该基准旨在作为自动驾驶视觉语言模型的评估平台。
intro_en: LingoQA is a novel dataset and benchmark for visual question answering in the autonomous driving domain. It contains 28,000 unique short video scenes and 419,000 annotations. Evaluations of state-of-the-art vision-language models show their performance still lags behind human level. LingoQA introduces Lingo-Judge, a fidelity classifier with a Spearman correlation of 0.95 against human evaluations, surpassing existing methods. This benchmark aims to serve as an evaluation platform for autonomous driving vision-language models.

name: LiveBench
intro: LiveBench是一个为大型语言模型设计的基准测试，旨在抵抗测试集污染和評審偏見。它包含来自最新信息源并频繁更新的问题，能够自动评分，涵盖数学、编程、推理、语言理解、指令遵循和数据分析等多种具有挑战性的任务。
org: Abacus.AI, New York University, NVIDIA, University of Maryland, USC, Columbia University, xAI
build_method: 混合、自动生成、网络爬取、专家构建
task_type: 选择题、开放式问答、代码生成、补全
eval_feature: 动态/实时、防污染、零样本
task_type_en: Multiple choice, open-ended questions, code generation, completion
intro_en: LiveBench is a benchmark designed for large language models to resist test set contamination and reviewer bias. It includes frequently updated questions from the latest information sources, supports automatic scoring, and covers a range of challenging tasks such as mathematics, programming, reasoning, language understanding, instruction following, and data analysis.

name: LiveCodeBench
intro: LiveCodeBench是一个针对大型语言模型代码相关任务的基准，通过持续收集LeetCode、AtCoder和CodeForces等竞赛平台的新题目，避免训练数据污染。评测范围广泛，涵盖代码生成、自我修复、代码执行和测试输出预测等能力。
build_method: 网络爬取、专家构建、混合
eval_feature: 动态/实时、防污染、思维链
intro_en: LiveCodeBench is a benchmark for code-related tasks in large language models. It continuously collects new problems from competitive platforms like LeetCode, AtCoder, and CodeForces to avoid training data contamination. The evaluation covers a wide range of abilities, including code generation, self-repair, code execution, and test output prediction.

name: LiveCodeBench Pro
intro: LiveCodeBench Pro 包含来自Codeforces、ICPC和IOI的持续更新题目，减少数据污染风险。由奥林匹克奖牌得主团队对每题进行算法分类和失败提交逐行分析。评测显示前沿模型在细致算法推理和复杂案例分析上仍存在显著不足，距离人类顶尖水平有较大差距。
org: New York University, Princeton University, University of California San Diego, University of Washing
eval_feature: 动态/实时、防污染、领域特定
intro_en: LiveCodeBench Pro includes continuously updated problems from Codeforces, ICPC, and IOI, minimizing data contamination risk. Each problem is algorithm-classified and analyzed line-by-line for failed submissions by a team of Olympic medalists. Evaluations show that state-of-the-art models still have significant shortcomings in detailed algorithmic reasoning and complex case analysis, falling far short of top human performance.

name: LiveDRBench
intro: LiveDRBench是一个评估深度研究（Deep Research）系统的基准，它不只关注最终报告，更强调搜索过程的广度和推理强度。该基准包含100个科学及公共领域的挑战性任务，并采用关键论点的中间表示来进行客观的性能衡量。
eval_feature: 动态/实时、过程导向、领域特定
intro_en: LiveDRBench is a benchmark for evaluating Deep Research systems, focusing not only on the final report but also on the breadth of the search process and the strength of reasoning. It includes 100 challenging tasks from scientific and public domains and uses intermediate representations of key arguments for objective performance measurement.

name: LiveMathBench
intro: LiveMathBench是一个由多项竞赛和考试题目组成的双语数学基准，旨在减少数据污染并评估大型语言模型的推理能力。该基准持续更新，并提出G-Pass@k指标，用于衡量模型在复杂推理任务中的性能潜力和稳定性。
org: Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory, Monash University
build_method: 考试题、网络爬取、LLM生成、混合
build_method_en: Exam questions, web scraping, LLM generation, hybrid
intro_en: LiveMathBench is a bilingual math benchmark composed of multiple competition and exam questions, designed to reduce data contamination and evaluate the reasoning ability of large language models. The benchmark is continuously updated and introduces the G-Pass@k metric to measure model performance potential and stability on complex reasoning tasks.

name: LLM Creative Story-Writing Benchmark
intro: Creative Story-Writing Benchmark V4评估大型语言模型在遵循创意简报的同时创作引人入胜故事的能力。每个故事需包含十个必备元素，并由多个独立评分模型基于18项指标进行评分，确保文学质量和约束满足度可比。
intro_en: Creative Story-Writing Benchmark V4 evaluates large language models' ability to craft engaging stories while adhering to creative briefs. Each story must include ten required elements and is scored by multiple independent evaluation models based on 18 metrics, ensuring comparable literary quality and constraint satisfaction.

name: LogicGame
intro: LogicGame是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）基于规则的推理能力的基准。它通过提供多样化的游戏场景，要求模型理解并应用预定义的规则来解决问题，从而将其逻辑推理能力与先验知识分离开来。该基准不仅评估最终结果，也关注中间步骤，并涵盖了从简单到复杂的不同难度级别。
intro_en: LogicGame is a benchmark designed to evaluate the rule-based reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs). It presents diverse game scenarios that require models to understand and apply predefined rules to solve problems, thereby separating their logical reasoning from prior knowledge. The benchmark assesses not only the final outcomes but also intermediate steps, covering a range of difficulty levels from simple to complex.

name: LogicVista
intro: LogicVista是一个评估多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在视觉情境下综合逻辑推理能力的基准测试。它通过5项逻辑推理任务和9种不同能力，使用448道多项选择题来评估MLLM的通用逻辑认知能力。每道题目都附有正确答案和人工编写的推理过程，支持开放式和多项选择评估。
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: LogicVista is a benchmark for evaluating the comprehensive logical reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in visual contexts. It assesses the general logical cognition of MLLMs through 5 logical reasoning tasks and 9 different capabilities, using 448 multiple-choice questions. Each question includes the correct answer and a human-written reasoning process, supporting both open-ended and multiple-choice evaluations.

name: LongBench v2
intro: LongBench v2是一个旨在评估大型语言模型在处理长上下文问题时进行深度理解和推理能力的基准。它包含503个具有挑战性的多项选择题，上下文长度从8千到200万词不等，覆盖了单文档问答、多文档问答、长上下文学习等六个任务类别。该基准通过自动化和人工审核流程确保了高质量和高难度，人类专家的准确率也仅为53.7%。
task_type: 选择题、问答、分类、摘要、代码生成
task_type_en: Multiple choice, question answering, classification, summarization, code generation
intro_en: LongBench v2 is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' deep understanding and reasoning abilities when handling long-context problems. It includes 503 challenging multiple-choice questions with context lengths ranging from 8,000 to 2 million words, covering six task categories such as single-document QA, multi-document QA, and long-context learning. The benchmark ensures high quality and difficulty through automated and manual review processes, with human experts achieving an accuracy of only 53.7%.

name: LongDocURL
intro: LongDocURL是一个综合性的多模态长文档基准测试，旨在评估大型视觉语言模型在长文档理解、数值推理和跨元素定位方面的能力。现有基准测试在处理页数和布局元素定位分析方面存在局限。该基准测试定义了长文档理解、数值推理和跨元素定位三个主要任务类别，并包含20个子任务。它通过半自动化构建流程收集了2,325个高质量问答对，覆盖超过33,000页文档，显著优于现有基准。
org: Tsinghua University, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence (BAAI), Institute of Automation Chin
modality: 文本, 图像, 多模态
intro_en: LongDocURL is a comprehensive multimodal long document benchmark designed to evaluate large vision-language models' abilities in long document understanding, numerical reasoning, and cross-element localization. Existing benchmarks have limitations in handling page counts and layout element localization analysis. This benchmark defines three main task categories: long document understanding, numerical reasoning, and cross-element localization, comprising 20 sub-tasks. It collects 2,325 high-quality QA pairs through a semi-automated construction process, covering over 33,000 pages, significantly surpassing existing benchmarks.

name: LongVideoBench
intro: LongVideoBench是一个以长达一小时的视频-语言交错输入为特色的问答基准。它包含3763个不同长度的网络视频及其字幕，旨在全面评估大型多模态模型（LMM）的长期多模态理解能力。该基准测试引入了一种新的视频问答任务，称为“引用推理”，要求模型根据问题中引用的视频上下文来推理相关的视频细节。LongVideoBench包含6678个人工标注的多项选择题，涵盖17个细分领域，为长视频理解提供了一个全面的评估框架。
org: Rhymes AI, Apple, Microsoft Research Asia, Salesforce AI Research
build_method: 网络爬取, 人工标注
intro_en: LongVideoBench is a QA benchmark featuring video-language inputs up to one hour long. It includes 3,763 web videos of varying lengths with subtitles, designed to comprehensively evaluate the long-term multimodal understanding ability of large multimodal models (LMMs). The benchmark introduces a new video QA task called "reference reasoning," which requires models to infer relevant video details based on referenced video context in the questions. LongVideoBench contains 6,678 human-annotated multiple-choice questions across 17 subdomains, providing a comprehensive evaluation framework for long video understanding.

name: LoraxBench
intro: LoraxBench是一个综合性的多语言基准测试，专注于印度尼西亚语和19种印度尼西亚本地方言，涵盖了6种不同的自然语言处理任务。该基准测试包含了特定语言的多种语域，强调了正式和非正式语音对模型性能的影响。LoraxBench由母语者进行专业翻译和验证，数据来源于印度尼西亚语的原创内容，因此比以英语为中心的数据更能捕捉到当地的细微差别。
metric: Accuracy, F1, Exact Match, BLEU, LLM-as-a-Judge
task_type: 选择题、开放式问答、自然语言推理、翻译、分类
task_type_en: Multiple choice, open-ended question answering, natural language inference, translation, classification
intro_en: LoraxBench is a comprehensive multilingual benchmark focusing on Indonesian and 19 regional Indonesian dialects, covering six different natural language processing tasks. The benchmark includes multiple language domains, emphasizing the impact of formal and informal speech on model performance. LoraxBench is professionally translated and validated by native speakers, with data sourced from original Indonesian content, making it better at capturing local nuances than English-centric datasets.

name: LVBench
intro: LVBench是一个旨在评估和提升多模态模型理解长视频能力的基准。它包含来自公共来源的视频，涵盖了长视频理解和信息提取的各种任务。LVBench旨在挑战多模态模型展示长期记忆和扩展理解能力，其广泛评估表明当前多模态模型在这些要求苛刻的长视频理解任务上表现仍然不佳。
org: Shanghai AI Laboratory, Shenzhen Institutes of Advanced Technology (CAS), Chinese Association for Ar
eval_feature: 长时记忆, 多样化任务, 人工标注
eval_feature_en: Long-term memory, diversified tasks, manual annotation
intro_en: LVBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate and enhance the ability of multimodal models to understand long videos. It includes videos from public sources and covers various tasks related to long video understanding and information extraction. LVBench aims to challenge multimodal models to demonstrate long-term memory and extended comprehension capabilities. Its extensive evaluation shows that current multimodal models still perform poorly on these demanding long video understanding tasks.

name: MARS-Bench
intro: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在真实世界对话应用中得到广泛采用，但其在处理长而复杂对话会话（包括频繁的动机转移、复杂的跨轮依赖）方面的鲁棒性受到批评。MARS-Bench是一个多轮竞技真实世界场景对话基准，旨在弥补这一空白。它通过逐场文字解说构建，旨在评估多轮对话的三个关键方面：超多轮、交互式多轮和跨轮任务。
org: ByteDance Seed, University of Science and Technology of China
intro_en: Large language models (LLMs) are widely used in real-world conversational applications, but their robustness in handling long and complex dialogue sessions—including frequent shifts in intent and complex cross-turn dependencies—has been criticized. MARS-Bench is a multi-turn competitive real-world scenario dialogue benchmark designed to address this gap. It is constructed through detailed textual annotations per session and aims to evaluate three key aspects of multi-turn dialogue: ultra-long turns, interactive multi-turns, and cross-turn tasks.

name: MATH
intro: MATH数据集包含12500道具有完整步骤解答的竞赛数学题，旨在衡量机器学习模型的数学问题解决能力。完整解答可用于训练模型生成答案推导和解释，促进数学推理相关研究和准确率提升。
intro_en: The MATH dataset contains 12,500 competition-level math problems with full step-by-step solutions, designed to evaluate the mathematical problem-solving ability of machine learning models. The complete solutions can be used to train models to generate answer derivations and explanations, promoting research in mathematical reasoning and improving accuracy.

name: Math-VR
intro: 近期大型语言模型和视觉语言模型在数学推理方面取得了显著进展，但在需要视觉辅助的问题上仍面临瓶颈。CodePlot-CoT是一种代码驱动的思维链范式，用于在数学中“通过图像思考”。Math-VR是首个大规模、双语数据集和基准，用于评估数学视觉推理问题，包含17.8万个样本。该工作为多模态数学推理开辟了新方向。
org: The University of Hong Kong, Tsinghua University, Alibaba, Chinese University of Hong Kong
intro_en: Recent large language models and vision-language models have made significant progress in mathematical reasoning but still face bottlenecks in visually assisted problems. CodePlot-CoT is a code-driven chain-of-thought paradigm designed for "thinking through images" in mathematics. Math-VR is the first large-scale, bilingual dataset and benchmark for evaluating mathematical visual reasoning problems, containing 178,000 samples. This work opens a new direction for multimodal mathematical reasoning.

name: MATH500
intro: MATH500是MATH数据集的一个子集，包含500个具有挑战性的竞赛数学问题。这些问题涵盖了代数、几何、数论和微积分等多个方面，每个问题都附有详细的步骤解答。该基准旨在评估模型在复杂数学推理和问题解决方面的能力。
intro_en: MATH500 is a subset of the MATH dataset, containing 500 challenging competition-level math problems. These problems cover algebra, geometry, number theory, and calculus, each accompanied by detailed step-by-step solutions. This benchmark aims to evaluate models' abilities in complex mathematical reasoning and problem-solving.

name: MathBench
intro: MathBench是一个用于严格评估大型语言模型数学能力的综合性基准。它覆盖了从基础算术到大学数学的五个难度级别，包含中英文双语问题，旨在全面考察模型的理论知识和实际应用能力。该基准不仅包含应用题，还设有理论题，以检验模型对基本概念的掌握程度。其独特的循环评估（Circular Evaluation）方法能更真实地反映模型的数学推理水平。
task_type: 数学问题、选择题、开放式问答
eval_feature: 思维链、领域特定、Bilingual Gradient Evaluation、Circular Evaluation (CE) Method
task_type_en: Mathematical problems, multiple-choice questions, open-ended questions
eval_feature_en: Chain of Thought, Domain-Specific, Bilingual Gradient Evaluation, Circular Evaluation (CE) Method
intro_en: MathBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the mathematical abilities of large language models. It covers five difficulty levels ranging from basic arithmetic to university-level mathematics and includes bilingual problems in both Chinese and English. The benchmark aims to thoroughly assess models' theoretical knowledge and practical application skills. It features not only applied problems but also theoretical questions to test models' grasp of fundamental concepts. Its unique Circular Evaluation method provides a more authentic reflection of models' mathematical reasoning capabilities.

name: MathCanvas-Bench
intro: MathCanvas是一个旨在为大型多模态模型（LMMs）提供内在视觉思维链（VCoT）能力的综合框架，以解决其在几何等数学领域中对视觉辅助的依赖。该框架通过两个阶段训练模型：首先是视觉操作阶段，利用15.2M对语料库进行图表生成和编辑的预训练；其次是战略性视觉辅助推理阶段，通过219K示例数据集进行微调，教授模型何时以及如何利用视觉辅助。为严格评估，引入了MathCanvas-Bench，一个包含3K问题的挑战性基准，要求模型生成交错的视觉-文本解决方案。
intro_en: MathCanvas is a comprehensive framework designed to equip large multimodal models (LMMs) with intrinsic visual chain-of-thought (VCoT) capabilities, addressing their reliance on visual aids in mathematical domains like geometry. The framework trains models in two stages: first, a visual operation stage with pretraining on a 15.2M corpus for chart generation and editing; second, a strategic visual-aided reasoning stage fine-tuned on a 219K example dataset to teach models when and how to use visual assistance. To rigorously evaluate performance, MathCanvas-Bench is introduced, a challenging benchmark with 3K problems requiring models to generate interleaved visual-text solutions.

name: MathVision
intro: MATH-Vision (MATH-V) 是一个精心策划的数据集，旨在评估大型多模态模型（LMMs）在视觉背景下的数学推理能力。它包含3,040个高质量的数学问题，这些问题来源于真实的数学竞赛，涵盖16个不同的数学学科和5个难度级别。该数据集揭示了当前LMMs与人类在MATH-V上的显著性能差距，并提供了详细的分类以指导未来的研究和开发。
org: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
build_method: 考试题改编, 人工标注
task_type: 图像问答, 数学问题解决
eval_feature: 多模态, 过程评估, 细致分类
task_type_en: Image Question Answering, Mathematical Problem Solving
intro_en: MATH-Vision (MATH-V) is a carefully curated dataset designed to evaluate the mathematical reasoning abilities of large multimodal models (LMMs) in visual contexts. It contains 3,040 high-quality math problems sourced from real math competitions, covering 16 different mathematical subjects and 5 difficulty levels. The dataset highlights the significant performance gap between current LMMs and humans on MATH-V and provides detailed categorizations to guide future research and development.

name: MaXIFE
intro: MaXIFE是一个综合性评估基准，旨在评估大型语言模型在23种不同语言中的指令遵循能力。它包含1667个可验证的指令任务，并结合了基于规则和基于模型的评估方法，以平衡效率和准确性。该基准旨在推动自然语言处理领域多语言指令遵循评估的研究和发展。
eval_feature: 多语言, 跨语言, 可验证
intro_en: MaXIFE is a comprehensive evaluation benchmark designed to assess large language models' instruction-following ability across 23 different languages. It includes 1,667 verifiable instruction tasks and combines rule-based and model-based evaluation methods to balance efficiency and accuracy. This benchmark aims to advance research and development in multilingual instruction-following evaluation within natural language processing.

name: MCP-Atlas
intro: MCP-Atlas是一个用于评估大型语言模型使用外部工具能力的大规模基准。它包含36个真实的MCP服务器和220个工具，涵盖了1000个需要通过3-6步工具调用来完成的复杂任务。该基准通过基于声明的评分规则来评估模型表现，并已公开发布部分任务集以促进社区研究。
eval_feature: 多轮、结果导向、动态/实时
intro_en: MCP-Atlas is a large-scale benchmark for evaluating large language models' ability to use external tools. It includes 36 real MCP servers and 220 tools, covering 1,000 complex tasks that require 3-6 steps of tool calls to complete. The benchmark assesses model performance based on rule-based scoring and has publicly released part of the task set to promote community research.

name: MCP-Bench
intro: MCP-Bench是一个基于模型上下文协议（MCP）的评测基准，旨在评估大型语言模型在真实多步任务中的工具使用能力。它连接了28个MCP服务器和250个工具，涵盖金融、旅行、科学计算等领域，测试模型在工具检索、多步规划和跨域协作方面的表现。
metric: Tool-level schema understanding and usage, Trajectory-level planning, Task completion
eval_feature: 动态/实时、多轮、领域特定
intro_en: MCP-Bench is an evaluation benchmark based on the Model Context Protocol (MCP), designed to assess large language models' ability to use tools in real multi-step tasks. It connects 28 MCP servers and 250 tools across domains such as finance, travel, and scientific computing, testing models on tool retrieval, multi-step planning, and cross-domain collaboration.

name: MCP-Universe
intro: 模型上下文协议（MCP）已成为连接大型语言模型到外部数据源和工具的变革性标准。现有基准过于简单，未能捕捉真实应用挑战。MCP-Universe是首个全面基准，旨在通过与真实世界MCP服务器交互，评估LLM在现实和困难任务中的表现。它涵盖6个核心领域，涉及11个不同的MCP服务器，包括位置导航、仓库管理、金融分析、3D设计、浏览器自动化和网页搜索。
eval_feature: 长文本, 零样本, 过程评估, 工具调用
eval_feature_en: Long text, zero-shot, process evaluation, tool invocation
intro_en: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has become a transformative standard connecting large language models to external data sources and tools. Existing benchmarks are overly simplistic and fail to capture real-world challenges. MCP-Universe is the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate LLM performance on realistic and difficult tasks through interaction with real-world MCP servers. It covers six core domains across 11 different MCP servers, including location navigation, warehouse management, financial analysis, 3D design, browser automation, and web search.

name: MCPMark
intro: MCPMark是一个旨在评估大语言模型（LLMs）与外部系统交互能力的基准测试。它由127个高质量任务组成，这些任务由领域专家和AI智能体共同创建，每个任务都包含一个初始状态和自动验证脚本。MCPMark通过模拟真实世界的工作流程，要求LLMs进行更丰富和多样化的环境交互，涉及广泛的创建、读取、更新和删除（CRUD）操作，以全面评估LLMs作为通用智能体的能力。
org: EVAL SYS, NUS TRAIL, LobeHub, University of British Columbia, National University of Singapore, West
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: MCPMark is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLMs) ability to interact with external systems. It consists of 127 high-quality tasks co-created by domain experts and AI agents, each featuring an initial state and an automated verification script. By simulating real-world workflows, MCPMark requires LLMs to perform richer and more diverse environment interactions, covering a wide range of create, read, update, and delete (CRUD) operations, to comprehensively assess LLMs' capabilities as general-purpose agents.

name: Med-HALT
intro: Med-HALT是专门用于评估大型语言模型在医疗领域幻觉问题的基准数据集，提供来自不同国家医疗检查的多样化数据，包含多种创新测试模式，涵盖推理和记忆幻觉两大类别。
build_method: 基于医疗检查数据构建
eval_feature: 评估医疗领域大模型幻觉问题，多种创新测试模式
build_method_en: Constructed Based on Medical Examination Data
eval_feature_en: Evaluating hallucination issues of large models in the medical field with various innovative testing methods
intro_en: Med-HALT is a benchmark dataset specifically designed to evaluate hallucination issues of large language models in the medical field. It provides diverse data from medical examinations across different countries and includes various innovative testing modes, covering both reasoning and memory hallucination categories.

name: MedAgentBench
intro: MedAgentBench是一个广泛的评估套件，旨在评测大型语言模型在医疗记录环境中的智能体能力。它包含300个由医生编写的临床任务和100名患者的真实数据，在一个符合FHIR标准的交互式环境中进行，以推动模型在复杂医疗任务中的规划和工具利用能力。
eval_feature: 过程导向、领域特定、多轮
scale: 300个任务, 100个患者, 70万个数据元素
intro_en: MedAgentBench is a comprehensive evaluation suite designed to assess large language models' agent capabilities in medical record environments. It includes 300 clinician-written clinical tasks and real data from 100 patients, conducted within an interactive environment compliant with FHIR standards, aiming to advance models' planning and tool-use abilities in complex medical tasks.

name: MedAlign
intro: MedAlign是由临床医生生成的电子病历指令遵循评测数据集，包含983条临床指令和303条人工参考回复，旨在评估大型语言模型在真实医疗场景中的指令遵循和EHR处理能力。
build_method: 人工标注，临床医生生成
metric: 临床医生评分（准确性, 质量）
task_type: 指令遵循, 文本生成
eval_feature: 评估LLM在医疗领域指令遵循和电子病历处理能力
scale: 983条指令, 303条人工参考回复, 276份电子病历
eval_feature_en: Evaluating LLM's instruction following and electronic medical record processing capabilities in the medical field
intro_en: MedAlign is an electronic health record instruction-following evaluation dataset generated by clinicians, containing 983 clinical instructions and 303 human reference responses. It aims to assess large language models' instruction-following and EHR processing capabilities in real medical scenarios.

name: MedBench
intro: MedBench是清华大学发布的全面、标准化的中文医疗大模型评测基准，涵盖43个临床专业，包含30万道题目，采用动态评估机制防止捷径学习，确保医疗大模型在实际部署前的有效性。
build_method: 数据整合与自动化评估
eval_feature: 全面标准化评测，43个临床专业，动态评估防止捷径学习
task_type_en: Question and Answer, Multiple Choice Question
eval_feature_en: Comprehensive standardized evaluation, 43 clinical specialties, dynamic assessment to prevent shortcut learning
intro_en: MedBench, released by Tsinghua University, is a comprehensive and standardized Chinese medical large model benchmark covering 43 clinical specialties with 300,000 questions. It employs a dynamic evaluation mechanism to prevent shortcut learning, ensuring the effectiveness of medical large models before deployment.

name: MedBullets
intro: MedBullets数据集与JAMA临床挑战共同构建，旨在评测大型语言模型对需复杂推理的医学难题的能力，超越标准医学考试的考察范围。MedBullets包含模拟临床多项选择题，配有专家撰写的详尽解析，更好地评估模型在真实临床场景中的推理和决策能力。
intro_en: The MedBullets dataset, developed alongside the JAMA Clinical Challenge, aims to evaluate large language models' ability to tackle complex medical reasoning tasks beyond standard medical exams. MedBullets includes simulated clinical multiple-choice questions with expert-written detailed explanations, better assessing models' reasoning and decision-making in real clinical scenarios.

name: MedCalc-Bench
intro: MedCalc-Bench是首个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）医学计算能力的数据集。它包含来自55个不同医学计算任务的1100个人工审核实例，每个实例都包含一份患者记录、一个计算特定医疗数值的问题、一个标准答案以及详细的解题步骤说明。该研究旨在揭示LLM在医疗场景下进行定量知识和推理方面存在的不足，以期推动未来LLM在各种临床计算任务中的改进。
task_type: 开放式问答、数学问题、抽取
task_type_en: Open-domain question answering, mathematical problems, extraction
intro_en: MedCalc-Bench is the first dataset designed to evaluate the medical calculation capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It includes 1,100 manually reviewed instances from 55 different medical calculation tasks. Each instance contains a patient record, a question requiring the calculation of a specific medical value, a standard answer, and detailed solution steps. This study aims to identify the shortcomings of LLMs in quantitative knowledge and reasoning within medical contexts, with the goal of driving future improvements in LLM performance across various clinical calculation tasks.

name: MedHallu
intro: MedHallu是首个专门用于检测大型语言模型医疗幻觉的综合基准，包含10000个高质量问答对，评估模型在医疗领域生成看似合理但事实不准确输出的倾向。
eval_feature: 首个专注医疗幻觉检测的基准，10K高质量问答对
eval_feature_en: The first benchmark focused on medical hallucination detection, 10K high-quality Q&A pairs
intro_en: MedHallu is the first comprehensive benchmark specifically designed to detect medical hallucinations in large language models. It contains 10,000 high-quality QA pairs to evaluate models' tendencies to generate plausible but factually incorrect outputs in the medical domain.

name: MedHELM
intro: MedHELM提出了一个可扩展的医学任务评估框架，弥补了现有医学许可考试评测无法充分反映临床实践复杂性的不足。框架基于29名临床专家验证的分类体系，涵盖5大类、22子类和121项任务。包含35个基准套件（17个现有，18个新建），并通过LLM评审机制和成本效益分析系统地比较模型表现。
build_method: 专家构建、人工标注、LLM生成
metric: LLM-as-Judge, Win Rate, Accuracy, Exact Match
task_type: 选择题、开放式问答、分类、生成、对话
task_type_en: Multiple choice, open-ended question, classification, generation, dialogue
build_method_en: Expert construction, manual annotation, LLM generation
intro_en: MedHELM proposes a scalable medical task evaluation framework that addresses the limitations of existing medical licensing exam assessments in fully reflecting the complexity of clinical practice. The framework is based on a classification system validated by 29 clinical experts, covering 5 major categories, 22 subcategories, and 121 tasks. It includes 35 benchmark suites (17 existing, 18 newly created) and systematically compares model performance through an LLM review mechanism and cost-effectiveness analysis.

name: MEDIQA-QA
intro: MEDIQA-QA是ACL BioNLP Workshop发布的医疗问答推理基准，旨在推动自然语言推理和问题蕴涵识别在医疗问答领域的应用，要求参与者对提供的答案进行正确性判断和重新排序。
task_type: 答案验证, 答案排序
eval_feature: 医疗问答推理，自然语言推理和问题蕴涵识别
eval_feature_en: Medical question answering reasoning, natural language inference, and question entailment recognition
intro_en: MEDIQA-QA is a medical question answering reasoning benchmark released by the ACL BioNLP Workshop. It aims to advance the application of natural language inference and question entailment recognition in the medical QA domain, requiring participants to assess the correctness of provided answers and reorder them accordingly.

name: MedMCQA
intro: MedMCQA是一个大规模多项选择题问答数据集，针对真实医学入学考试题目设计。包含来自AIIMS和NEET PG考试的19.4万道高质量题目，涵盖2400个医疗主题和21个医学科目。该数据集测试模型在广泛医学领域的推理能力。
build_method: 从在线资源和书籍中收集，这些资源和书籍汇集了由医学专业人士创建的多个模拟测试和在线测试系列。
build_method_en: Collected from online resources and books, these resources and books compile multiple simulated tests and online test series created by medical professionals.
intro_en: MedMCQA is a large-scale multiple-choice question answering dataset designed for real medical entrance exam questions. It contains 194,000 high-quality questions from AIIMS and NEET PG exams, covering 2,400 medical topics and 21 medical subjects. This dataset evaluates models' reasoning abilities across a wide range of medical fields.

name: MedMT-Bench
intro: MedMT-Bench是一个针对长医疗对话的挑战性基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型在医疗场景中的长上下文记忆、理解、抗干扰性、自我纠正、安全防御、指令澄清以及多指令响应能力。该基准测试涵盖了诊断前、诊断中和诊断后阶段，数据通过场景合成并由专家进行精炼，共包含400个测试用例，平均22轮对话。它采用LLM作为评估协议，通过实例级评估标准和原子测试点来评估LLM在医疗对话场景中的长期记忆、安全性和指令遵循方面的表现。
org: University of California, Los Angeles, Queen Mary University of London, Peking University, Hong Kong
metric: Accuracy, Human-LLM agreement, Consistency Rate, Overall Accuracy
task_type: 长多轮指令遵循, 医疗对话理解, 安全评估
eval_feature: 长上下文记忆, 安全防御, 指令澄清, 多指令响应, 合成数据生成, 专家精炼, 原子测试点
task_type_en: Long multi-turn instruction following, medical dialogue understanding, safety assessment
eval_feature_en: Long-context memory, security defense, instruction clarification, multi-instruction response, synthetic data generation, expert refinement, atomic test points
intro_en: MedMT-Bench is a challenging benchmark for long medical dialogues, designed to evaluate large language models' long-context memory, comprehension, robustness, self-correction, safety defense, instruction clarification, and multi-instruction response capabilities in medical scenarios. The benchmark covers pre-diagnosis, diagnosis, and post-diagnosis stages, with data synthesized from scenarios and refined by experts, comprising 400 test cases with an average of 22 dialogue turns each. It uses LLMs as the evaluation protocol, assessing their long-term memory, safety, and instruction adherence in medical dialogue contexts through instance-level evaluation criteria and atomic test points.

name: MedNLI
intro: MedNLI是一个面向临床领域的自然语言推理（NLI）数据集。该数据集由医生基于患者的真实病历进行标注，旨在推动模型在知识密集且数据有限的专业领域（如医疗）中的应用。研究者通过利用开放域数据的迁移学习和医学术语等领域知识，有效提升了模型的性能。
intro_en: MedNLI is a clinical domain natural language inference (NLI) dataset. It is annotated by doctors based on real patient records, aiming to advance model applications in knowledge-intensive and data-scarce specialized fields like medicine. Researchers have effectively improved model performance by leveraging transfer learning from open-domain data and incorporating domain knowledge such as medical terminology.

name: MedQA
intro: MedQA是首个自由格式多项选择开放领域医学问答数据集，来源于专业医学执业考试。它涵盖英语、简体中文和繁体中文三种语言，旨在对现有的开放领域问答系统构成挑战，并推动自然语言处理领域更强大模型的发展。
org: Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Huazhong University of Science and Technology
intro_en: MedQA is the first free-format multiple-choice open-domain medical question answering dataset, derived from professional medical licensing exams. It covers English, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese, aiming to challenge existing open-domain QA systems and promote the development of more powerful models in natural language processing.

name: MedS-Bench
intro: MedS-Bench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在临床环境中表现的综合性基准。它涵盖了11个高级临床任务，如临床报告摘要、治疗建议和诊断等，旨在解决现有基准主要关注选择题的局限性。评测结果显示，即便是最先进的模型在处理这些复杂任务时也面临挑战。
task_type: 选择题、开放式问答、分类、生成、抽取、摘要、事实验证
task_type_en: Multiple choice, open-ended question answering, classification, generation, extraction, summarization, fact verification
intro_en: MedS-Bench is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating large language models in clinical settings. It covers 11 advanced clinical tasks, such as clinical report summarization, treatment recommendations, and diagnosis, addressing the limitation of existing benchmarks that mainly focus on multiple-choice questions. Evaluation results show that even state-of-the-art models face challenges in handling these complex tasks.

name: MedSafetyBench
intro: MedSafetyBench是首个基于美国医学会医学伦理原则来评估大型语言模型医疗安全性的基准。它包含1800个有害医疗请求和相应的安全回应，旨在系统性地研究和提升大模型在医疗应用中的安全性。通过该基准的评估和微调，可以有效降低大模型在医疗领域应用的潜在风险。
intro_en: MedSafetyBench is the first benchmark for evaluating the medical safety of large language models based on the American Medical Association's medical ethics principles. It includes 1,800 harmful medical prompts and corresponding safe responses, aiming to systematically study and improve the safety of large models in medical applications. Evaluation and fine-tuning using this benchmark can effectively reduce potential risks of large models in the medical field.

name: MedXpertQA
intro: MedXpertQA是一个用于评估专家级医学知识和高级推理能力的基准。包含4460个问题，涵盖17个专业和11个身体系统，分为文本子集和多模态子集。多模态部分采用包含多样图像和丰富临床数据（如病历和检查结果）的专家级考试题目。
intro_en: MedXpertQA is a benchmark designed to evaluate expert-level medical knowledge and advanced reasoning abilities. It contains 4,460 questions covering 17 specialties and 11 body systems, divided into text and multimodal subsets. The multimodal subset features expert-level exam questions with diverse images and rich clinical data, such as medical records and test results.

name: MIA-Bench
intro: MIA-Bench是一个新的基准，旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）严格遵循复杂指令的能力。该基准包含400个图像-提示对，每个都旨在挑战模型在生成满足特定请求模式的准确响应时对分层指令的遵循。评估结果显示了最先进的MLLM在性能上存在显著差异，突出了指令遵循方面的改进空间。
org: Apple, NVIDIA, Roblox, New York University, Nanjing University, The Hong Kong University of Science
intro_en: MIA-Bench is a new benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to strictly follow complex instructions. It contains 400 image-prompt pairs, each intended to challenge models in generating accurate responses that meet specific request patterns while adhering to hierarchical instructions. Evaluation results reveal significant performance gaps among state-of-the-art MLLMs, highlighting room for improvement in instruction following.

name: MixEval
intro: MixEval 提出了一种通过策略性地混合现有基准来建立高效、黄金标准的大型语言模型（LLM）评估的新范式。它通过将从网络中挖掘的真实世界用户查询与现有基准中的相似查询进行匹配，弥合了真实用户查询的全面性与基于标准答案的基准的高效性之间的差距。基于此，MixEval构建了更具挑战性的MixEval-Hard，为模型改进提供了更大空间。
org: National University of Singapore, Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence, Carnegie
build_method: 混合现有基准、网络挖掘
intro_en: MixEval proposes a new paradigm for establishing efficient, gold-standard evaluations of large language models (LLMs) by strategically mixing existing benchmarks. It bridges the gap between the comprehensiveness of real-world user queries mined from the web and the efficiency of benchmark queries with standard answers by matching similar queries from existing benchmarks. Based on this, MixEval creates the more challenging MixEval-Hard, offering greater room for model improvement.

name: MixEval-Hard
intro: MixEval-Hard是MixEval的升级版，设计更具挑战性，旨在为模型改进提供更大空间。该基准通过混合多种现成评测，桥接真实用户查询与标准答案基准的差距。
intro_en: MixEval-Hard is an upgraded version of MixEval, designed to be more challenging and provide greater room for model improvement. This benchmark bridges the gap between real user queries and standard answer benchmarks by combining multiple existing evaluations.

name: MLE-Bench
intro: MLE-Bench是一个用于评估AI智能体在机器学习工程方面表现的基准。它收集了75个Kaggle机器学习工程竞赛，旨在测试AI智能体在模型训练、数据准备和实验运行等方面的真实世界技能。该基准通过开源智能体脚手架评估了前沿语言模型，并建立了人类基线。
org: OpenAI, University of California Berkeley, Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Stanford Universit
intro_en: MLE-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating AI agents' performance in machine learning engineering. It compiles 75 Kaggle machine learning engineering competitions to test agents' real-world skills in model training, data preparation, and experiment execution. The benchmark assesses state-of-the-art language models using an open-source agent framework and establishes a human baseline.

name: MLGym
intro: MLGym是首个面向机器学习任务的Gym环境，支持大型语言模型代理的评估与开发。它包含13个多样化且开放式的AI研究任务，涵盖计算机视觉、自然语言处理和强化学习等领域，旨在促进对AI研究型Agent的开发与评估。
metric: Success Rate, Average Normalized Score, Elo Rating
intro_en: MLGym is the first Gym environment designed for machine learning tasks, supporting the evaluation and development of large language model agents. It includes 13 diverse and open-ended AI research tasks spanning computer vision, natural language processing, and reinforcement learning, aiming to advance the development and assessment of AI research agents.

name: MLVU
intro: MLVU是一个多任务长视频理解基准，旨在全面深入评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在长视频理解（LVU）任务中的性能。它通过显著扩展视频长度、包含多样化的视频类型（如电影、监控录像、自我中心视频、卡通、游戏视频等）以及开发多样化的评估任务来解决现有基准的局限性。对23个最新MLLMs的实证研究表明，现有技术在处理长视频时仍有显著提升空间，且在大多数评估任务中表现不佳。MLVU有望通过对MLLMs的全面深入分析，推动长视频理解领域的研究进展。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence, Shan
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题
intro_en: MLVU is a multi-task long video understanding benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate the performance of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on long video understanding (LVU) tasks. It addresses the limitations of existing benchmarks by significantly extending video length, including diverse video types (such as movies, surveillance footage, egocentric videos, cartoons, game videos, etc.), and developing a variety of evaluation tasks. An empirical study of 23 state-of-the-art MLLMs shows that current techniques still have substantial room for improvement in handling long videos and perform poorly on most evaluation tasks. MLVU aims to advance research in long video understanding through comprehensive and in-depth analysis of MLLMs.

name: MM-BrowseComp
intro: MM-BrowseComp是一个全面的多模态深度研究基准，旨在评估智能体通过浏览和推理多模态网页内容来解决复杂问题的能力。该基准包含224个具有挑战性的多跳问题，每个问题的解决方案都特意设计为需要理解图像或视频模态中的内容。评估结果显示，即使是OpenAI o3等最强模型也未能超过30%的准确率，凸显了当前模型在多模态理解和推理方面的不足。该基准还提供了经过验证的清单，用于细粒度分析多模态依赖性和推理路径。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Tsinghua University, University of California, B
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
modality: 文本, 图像, 视频, 多模态
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Dynamic updating, contamination prevention, process evaluation
intro_en: MM-BrowseComp is a comprehensive multimodal deep research benchmark designed to evaluate agents' ability to solve complex problems by browsing and reasoning over multimodal web content. The benchmark includes 224 challenging multi-hop questions, each requiring understanding of content in image or video modalities. Evaluation results show that even top models like OpenAI o3 fail to exceed 30% accuracy, highlighting current limitations in multimodal understanding and reasoning. The benchmark also provides a validated checklist for fine-grained analysis of multimodal dependencies and reasoning paths.

name: MM-MTBench
intro: MM-MT-Bench是一个多轮LLM-as-a-judge评估基准，类似于文本MT-Bench，用于测试多模态指令调优模型。现有基准测试（如MMMU、MathVista、ChartQA等）侧重于封闭式问题和简短回答，无法评估模型在多轮对话中遵循用户指令和零样本回答开放式问题的能力。MM-MT-Bench旨在克服这一限制。
task_type: 开放式问答, 多轮对话
intro_en: MM-MT-Bench is a multi-turn LLM-as-a-judge evaluation benchmark, similar to the text-based MT-Bench, designed to test multimodal instruction-tuned models. Existing benchmarks (such as MMMU, MathVista, ChartQA, etc.) focus on closed-ended questions and short answers, and cannot assess a model's ability to follow user instructions and provide zero-shot answers to open-ended questions in multi-turn dialogues. MM-MT-Bench aims to overcome this limitation.

name: MMBench
intro: MMBench是一个旨在全面评估视觉语言模型（VLMs）多模态能力的双语基准测试。它通过精心策划的质量控制方案，提供了大量多样化的评估问题。MMBench引入了CircularEval策略，并利用大型语言模型将自由形式的预测转换为预定义选项，以确保评估结果的准确性。该基准测试包含中英文多项选择题，支持对VLMs性能进行公平比较。
org: OpenCompass Community, Shanghai AI Laboratory, The University of Hong Kong, SenseTime, Shanghai Jiao
eval_feature: 双语, 防污染, 过程评估
intro_en: MMBench is a bilingual benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate the multimodal capabilities of visual language models (VLMs). It offers a large and diverse set of evaluation questions through a carefully curated quality control scheme. MMBench introduces the CircularEval strategy and uses large language models to convert free-form predictions into predefined options, ensuring the accuracy of evaluation results. The benchmark includes multiple-choice questions in both Chinese and English, supporting fair comparisons of VLM performance.

name: MMBench-Video
intro: MMBench-Video是一个用于严格评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）视频理解能力的定量基准。该基准包含来自YouTube的长视频和自由形式的问题，更贴近实际应用场景，旨在严谨评估模型的视频理解水平。所有问题均由人工根据精心构建的能力分类法进行标注。
org: Shanghai Jiao Tong University, SenseTime Research, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI
intro_en: MMBench-Video is a quantitative benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the video understanding capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs). It includes long videos from YouTube and open-ended questions, reflecting real-world scenarios, and aims to provide a thorough assessment of models' video comprehension. All questions are manually annotated based on a carefully constructed taxonomy of abilities.

name: MME
intro: MME是一个针对多模态大型语言模型的综合性评估基准。它旨在衡量模型在14个子任务上的感知和认知能力，包括存在、计数、位置、颜色、海报、名人、场景、地标、艺术品、OCR、常识推理、数值计算、文本翻译和代码推理。为避免数据泄漏，所有指令-答案对均由人工设计。
org: Nanjing University, Tencent Youtu Lab, Xiamen University, Chinese Academy of Sciences
task_type: 混合(选择题, 开放式问答)
intro_en: MME is a comprehensive evaluation benchmark for multimodal large language models. It aims to assess models' perceptual and cognitive abilities across 14 subtasks, including existence, counting, location, color, posters, celebrities, scenes, landmarks, artworks, OCR, commonsense reasoning, numerical calculation, text translation, and code reasoning. To prevent data leakage, all instruction-answer pairs are manually designed.

name: MMLongBench
intro: MMLongBench是首个涵盖多种长上下文视觉-语言任务的基准，旨在有效且全面地评估长上下文视觉-语言模型（LCVLMs）。它包含13,331个示例，涵盖五种不同类别的下游任务，如视觉RAG和多样本ICL。该基准通过提供广泛的任务覆盖、多样的图像类型和严格的长度控制，为诊断和推进下一代LCVLMs提供了基础。
org: Zhaowei Wang, Wenhao Yu, Xiyu Ren, Jipeng Zhang, Yu Zhao, Rohit Saxena, Liang Cheng, Ginny Wong, Sim
eval_feature: 长上下文, 多模态, 跨模态
intro_en: MMLongBench is the first benchmark covering various long-context vision-language tasks, designed to effectively and comprehensively evaluate long-context vision-language models (LCVLMs). It includes 13,331 examples across five different downstream task categories, such as visual RAG and multi-sample ICL. By offering broad task coverage, diverse image types, and strict length control, this benchmark provides a foundation for diagnosing and advancing the next generation of LCVLMs.

name: MMLU
intro: MMLU是一个多任务准确率测试，涵盖57个任务，包括基础数学、美国历史、计算机科学和法律等。高准确率要求模型具备广泛的世界知识和问题解决能力。
org: UC Berkeley, Columbia University, UChicago, UIUC
intro_en: MMLU is a multi-task accuracy test covering 57 tasks, including basic math, U.S. history, computer science, and law. High accuracy requires models to have broad world knowledge and problem-solving skills.

name: MMLU-CF
intro: MMLU-CF是一个无污染且更具挑战性的多项选择题基准，用于评估大型语言模型的常识、理解和解决问题能力。通过广泛领域数据和去污染规则，确保评测结果可靠。包含公开验证集和封闭测试集。
build_method: 网络爬取、自动生成、混合
eval_feature: 防污染、结果导向、零样本、少样本
intro_en: MMLU-CF is a clean and more challenging multiple-choice benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' commonsense, comprehension, and problem-solving abilities. It ensures reliable evaluation results through extensive domain data and decontamination rules. It includes both a public validation set and a closed test set.

name: MMLU-Pro
intro: MMLU-Pro是MMLU的增强版，旨在通过整合更具挑战性的、以推理为中心的问题，并将选项从四个扩展到十个，来扩展以知识驱动为主的MMLU基准。该基准包含了超过12,000个来自学术考试和教科书的严谨策划的问题，涵盖14个不同领域。实验结果表明，MMLU-Pro不仅提升了挑战性，还表现出在不同提示下的更高稳定性。
intro_en: MMLU-Pro is an enhanced version of MMLU, designed to expand the knowledge-driven MMLU benchmark by incorporating more challenging, reasoning-focused questions and increasing the number of options from four to ten. The benchmark includes over 12,000 rigorously curated questions from academic exams and textbooks, covering 14 different domains. Experimental results show that MMLU-Pro not only increases difficulty but also demonstrates greater stability across different prompts.

name: MMLU-Redux
intro: MMLU-Redux是MMLU的一个经过修正的子集，旨在解决原始数据集中存在的标注错误问题。该数据集包含了对MMLU全部57个学科的5700个问题的手动重新标注，研究发现原始数据集中约有6.49%的题目存在错误。通过提供更准确的基准，MMLU-Redux有助于更可靠地评估和比较大型语言模型的能力。
intro_en: MMLU-Redux is a revised subset of MMLU designed to address annotation errors in the original dataset. It contains 5,700 manually re-annotated questions covering all 57 subjects of MMLU. Studies found that about 6.49% of the original questions contained errors. By providing a more accurate benchmark, MMLU-Redux helps to more reliably evaluate and compare the capabilities of large language models.

name: MMLU-Redux 2.0
intro: MMLU-Redux是一个经过精心手动重新注释的MMLU（大规模多任务语言理解）数据集子集，旨在纠正原始基准中的错误，提供一个更准确、更可靠的评测标准。该子集包含57个MMLU科目中的5700个问题。研究结果表明，原始MMLU中约有6.49%的问题存在错误，使用MMLU-Redux进行评测可以显著改变模型性能的评估结果。
org: University of Edinburgh, Sapienza University of Rome, Polytechnic University of Bari, University Col
intro_en: MMLU-Redux is a carefully manually re-annotated subset of the MMLU (Massive Multitask Language Understanding) dataset, designed to correct errors in the original benchmark and provide a more accurate and reliable evaluation standard. This subset contains 5,700 questions from 57 MMLU subjects. Research shows that about 6.49% of the questions in the original MMLU contain errors, and using MMLU-Redux for evaluation can significantly alter the assessment of model performance.

name: MMMU
intro: MMMU是一个评估多模态模型在需要大学水平知识和推理任务上的基准，包含来自六个学科的11500个问题和多样化图像类型。该基准设计用于测试模型的高级感知与领域知识推理能力。
org: IN.AI Research, University of Waterloo, The Ohio State University, Carnegie Mellon University, Unive
intro_en: MMMU is a benchmark for evaluating multimodal models on tasks requiring university-level knowledge and reasoning. It includes 11,500 questions from six disciplines and diverse image types. The benchmark is designed to test models' advanced perception and domain knowledge reasoning abilities.

name: MMMU-Pro
intro: MMMU-Pro是MMMU基准的强化版本，通过剔除文本模型可解答的问题、扩展候选选项，并引入仅视觉输入的设置（问题嵌入图像中），严格评估多模态模型的真实理解与推理能力。结果显示模型在MMMU-Pro上的表现显著下降，提供了更严苛的多模态AI评测工具。
org: The Ohio State University, University of Waterloo, Carnegie Mellon University
eval_feature: 对抗性、思维链、领域特定
intro_en: MMMU-Pro is an enhanced version of the MMMU benchmark that strictly evaluates multimodal models' true understanding and reasoning abilities by removing questions solvable by text-only models, expanding candidate options, and introducing a vision-only setting (with questions embedded in images). Results show a significant performance drop on MMMU-Pro, providing a more rigorous multimodal AI evaluation tool.

name: MMSIBench
intro: MMSI-Bench是一个专注于多图像空间智能的视觉问答（VQA）基准测试。它旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在复杂物理世界中进行多图像空间推理的能力。该基准包含1,000个具有挑战性的多项选择题，由六位3D视觉研究人员精心制作，并配有详细的推理过程和精心设计的干扰项。通过对34个MLLM的广泛实验，MMSI-Bench揭示了模型与人类表现之间的巨大差距，为未来的研究提供了广阔空间。
org: Shanghai AI Laboratory, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Zhejiang University, Tsinghua Universit
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
eval_feature: 多图像, 高质量, 真实世界场景对齐, 综合性与挑战性, 思维链
eval_feature_en: Multi-image, high quality, real-world scene alignment, comprehensiveness and challenge, chain of thought
intro_en: MMSI-Bench is a visual question answering (VQA) benchmark focused on multi-image spatial intelligence. It aims to evaluate the ability of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perform multi-image spatial reasoning in complex physical environments. The benchmark includes 1,000 challenging multiple-choice questions, carefully crafted by six 3D vision researchers, with detailed reasoning processes and well-designed distractors. Extensive experiments on 34 MLLMs reveal a significant gap between model and human performance, highlighting ample opportunities for future research.

name: MMStar
intro: MMStar是一个精英级的视觉不可或缺的多模态基准测试，包含1500个经过人工精心挑选的样本。它旨在评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）的多模态能力，涵盖6个核心能力和18个详细维度。该基准测试通过自动化流程初步筛选样本，并进行严格的人工审查，以确保样本具有视觉依赖性、最小数据泄露，并需要高级多模态能力。此外，还开发了两种指标来衡量数据泄露和多模态训练中的实际性能增益。
org: University of Science and Technology of China, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai Artific
intro_en: MMStar is an elite, vision-essential multimodal benchmark consisting of 1,500 carefully curated samples. It aims to evaluate the multimodal capabilities of large vision-language models (LVLMs), covering 6 core abilities and 18 detailed dimensions. The benchmark uses an automated process for initial sample screening followed by rigorous manual review to ensure visual dependency, minimal data leakage, and the need for advanced multimodal skills. Additionally, two metrics were developed to measure data leakage and actual performance gains in multimodal training.

name: MMVP
intro: MMVP基准测试旨在揭示多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在视觉理解方面的系统性缺陷。该基准通过构建“CLIP盲点对”——即CLIP认为相似但视觉上明显不同的图像——来评估模型。MMVP包含九种基本视觉模式的直接问题，即使是GPT-4V等最先进系统也难以正确回答，并常提供错误的解释。研究表明，视觉表征学习仍是一个开放挑战，准确的视觉接地对未来成功的多模态系统至关重要。
org: New York University, University of California, Berkeley, Princeton University, Meta AI Research (FAI
intro_en: The MMVP benchmark aims to reveal systematic flaws in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) regarding visual understanding. It evaluates models by constructing "CLIP blind spot pairs"—images that CLIP deems similar but are visually distinct. MMVP includes direct questions covering nine fundamental visual patterns, which even state-of-the-art systems like GPT-4V struggle to answer correctly and often provide incorrect explanations for. The study highlights that visual representation learning remains an open challenge, and accurate visual grounding is crucial for the future success of multimodal systems.

name: MMVU
intro: MMVU是一个全面的专家级、多学科视频理解基准，用于评估基础模型在视频理解方面的能力。它包含3,000个由专家标注的问题，涵盖科学、医疗健康、人文社会科学和工程四大核心学科的27个主题。MMVU旨在挑战模型应用领域特定知识并进行专家级推理，以分析专业领域的视频，超越了当前视频基准中通常评估的基本视觉感知。每个示例都由人类专家从头开始标注，并辅以专家标注的推理依据和相关领域知识，以促进深入分析。
org: Yilun Zhao, Lujing Xie, Haowei Zhang, Guo Gan, Yitao Long, Zhiyuan Hu, Tongyan Hu, Weiyuan Chen, Chu
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: MMVU is a comprehensive expert-level, multidisciplinary video understanding benchmark designed to evaluate foundational models' capabilities in video comprehension. It includes 3,000 expert-annotated questions covering 27 topics across four core disciplines: science, medical health, humanities and social sciences, and engineering. MMVU aims to challenge models to apply domain-specific knowledge and perform expert-level reasoning to analyze videos in specialized fields, going beyond the basic visual perception typically assessed in current video benchmarks. Each example is annotated from scratch by human experts, accompanied by expert-provided reasoning and relevant domain knowledge to support in-depth analysis.

name: MORSE-500
intro: MORSE-500是一个视频基准测试，旨在解决现有基准在多模态推理方面的不足。它包含500个完全脚本化的视频片段和嵌入式问题，涵盖六种互补的推理类别。该基准测试通过程序化生成，支持对视觉复杂性、干扰密度和时间动态的精细控制，并能系统地调整难度。MORSE-500旨在通过其可控的生成管道，支持创建任意具有挑战性的新实例，以压力测试下一代模型。
org: University of Maryland, Google, Cornell University
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Dynamic updating, contamination prevention, process evaluation
intro_en: MORSE-500 is a video benchmark designed to address the limitations of existing benchmarks in multimodal reasoning. It contains 500 fully scripted video clips with embedded questions, covering six complementary reasoning categories. The benchmark is programmatically generated, allowing fine-grained control over visual complexity, interference density, and temporal dynamics, as well as systematic difficulty adjustment. MORSE-500 aims to support the creation of arbitrarily challenging new instances through its controllable generation pipeline to stress-test next-generation models.

name: MotionBench
intro: MotionBench是一个全面的评估基准，旨在评估视频理解模型对细粒度运动的理解能力。它通过六种主要类型的运动导向问题来评估模型的运动级感知，并包含从不同来源收集的数据，确保了对真实世界视频内容的广泛代表性。实验结果表明，现有视觉语言模型在理解细粒度运动方面表现不佳，该基准旨在指导和激励开发更强大的视频理解模型。
build_method: 网络爬取, 自动生成, 人工标注, 混合
metric: Accuracy, MR, LM, CM, MO, AO, RC
eval_feature: 细粒度评估, 多样化数据, 高质量标注
build_method_en: Web scraping, automatic generation, manual annotation, hybrid
eval_feature_en: Fine-grained evaluation, diverse data, high-quality annotation
intro_en: MotionBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate video understanding models' ability to comprehend fine-grained motion. It assesses models' motion-level perception through six main types of motion-oriented questions and includes data collected from various sources to ensure broad representation of real-world video content. Experimental results show that existing vision-language models perform poorly in understanding fine-grained motion, and this benchmark aims to guide and inspire the development of more robust video understanding models.

name: MRCR
intro: OpenAI MRCR（多轮共指消解）是一个长上下文数据集，用于评估大型语言模型在上下文中区分多个“针”的能力。该评估的灵感来自Gemini首次引入的MRCR评估。OpenAI MRCR扩展了任务难度，并提供了开源数据以重现结果。该任务具有挑战性，因为“针”与干扰项来自相同的分布，模型必须区分“针”的顺序，并且上下文越长，任务越困难。
task_type: 开放式问答, 多轮对话
eval_feature: 防污染, 思维链, 长上下文
eval_feature_en: Contamination prevention, chain of thought, long context
intro_en: OpenAI MRCR (Multi-turn Coreference Resolution) is a long-context dataset designed to evaluate large language models' ability to distinguish multiple "needles" within context. This benchmark is inspired by the MRCR evaluation first introduced by Gemini. OpenAI MRCR increases task difficulty and provides open-source data for result reproduction. The task is challenging because the "needles" and distractors come from the same distribution, models must differentiate the order of the "needles," and the longer the context, the harder the task.

name: MT-Bench
intro: MT-Bench是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）多轮对话能力的基准。它通过一系列具有挑战性的开放式问题，测试模型在对话和指令遵循方面的表现。
