org: UC Berkeley, Carnegie Mellon University, Stanford University, MBZUAI, UC San Diego, LMSYS
metric: 使用强LLM（如GPT-4）作为裁判进行打分，并与人类偏好进行比较
task_type: 对话、开放式问答、指令遵循
task_type_en: Dialogue, open-ended question answering, instruction following
intro_en: MT-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating the multi-turn dialogue capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It tests models' performance in conversation and instruction following through a series of challenging open-ended questions.

name: MT-Bench-101
intro: MT-Bench-101是一个专门为评估大型语言模型（LLM）在多轮对话中细粒度能力而设计的基准。它通过分析真实的多轮对话数据，构建了一个包含13个不同任务中1388个多轮对话的4208个轮次的三层分层能力分类法。该基准对21个流行的LLM进行了评估，从能力和任务的角度进行了全面分析。研究发现，常见对齐技术或聊天特定设计并未显著提升LLM的多轮对话能力。
org: Alibaba Group, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI Laboratory
intro_en: MT-Bench-101 is a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate the fine-grained capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in multi-turn conversations. By analyzing real multi-turn dialogue data, it constructs a three-layer hierarchical taxonomy of abilities, covering 4,208 turns across 1,388 multi-turn dialogues in 13 different tasks. The benchmark evaluates 21 popular LLMs, providing a comprehensive analysis from both capability and task perspectives. The study finds that common alignment techniques or chat-specific designs do not significantly improve LLMs' multi-turn conversational abilities.

name: MTVQA
intro: MTVQA是一个多语言文本中心视觉问答基准，旨在评估AI模型在文本中心场景理解方面的能力。该基准首次通过高质量的人工专家标注，涵盖9种不同语言，包含6,778个问答对和2,116张图像。它揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在多语言文本中心视觉问答任务上与人类表现之间存在显著差距，并提供了多语言训练数据以促进模型性能提升。
org: ByteDance Inc., Huazhong University of Science and Technology
intro_en: MTVQA is a multilingual text-centered visual question answering benchmark designed to evaluate AI models' ability in text-centered scene understanding. This benchmark, for the first time, features high-quality expert annotations across 9 different languages, containing 6,778 QA pairs and 2,116 images. It reveals a significant gap between current multimodal large language models and human performance on multilingual text-centered visual QA tasks, and provides multilingual training data to facilitate model improvement.

name: MUIRBENCH
intro: MuirBench是一个全面的基准测试，旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（LLMs）的鲁棒多图像理解能力。它包含12个不同的多图像任务和10个多图像关系类别，由11,264张图像和2,600个多项选择题组成。该基准通过将每个标准实例与语义差异最小的无法回答的变体配对，以实现可靠评估，并揭示了现有模型在此任务上的不足。
org: USC, UPenn, UMN, UC Davis, UW-Madison, UCLA, OSU, Microsoft Research
task_type: 多项选择题, 图像问答
task_type_en: Multiple choice question, Visual question answering
intro_en: MuirBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the robust multi-image understanding capabilities of multimodal large language models (LLMs). It includes 12 different multi-image tasks and 10 categories of multi-image relationships, comprising 11,264 images and 2,600 multiple-choice questions. The benchmark ensures reliable evaluation by pairing each standard instance with an unanswerable variant that has minimal semantic differences, revealing the shortcomings of existing models on this task.

name: MulDimIF
intro: 该基准旨在评估大型语言模型遵循用户定义指令的能力。现有基准通常依赖模板化约束提示，缺乏真实世界使用的多样性，限制了细粒度的性能评估。为解决此问题，我们提出了一个多维约束框架，包含三种约束模式、四种约束类别和四个难度级别。在此框架基础上，我们开发了一个自动化指令生成流程，包括约束扩展、冲突检测和指令重写，生成了1200个可代码验证的指令遵循测试样本。
task_type: 指令遵循, 开放式问答
eval_feature: 多维约束, 自动化指令生成, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Multidimensional constraints, automated instruction generation, process evaluation
intro_en: This benchmark aims to evaluate large language models' ability to follow user-defined instructions. Existing benchmarks often rely on templated constraint prompts, lacking the diversity of real-world usage and limiting fine-grained performance assessment. To address this, we propose a multidimensional constraint framework featuring three constraint modes, four constraint categories, and four difficulty levels. Based on this framework, we developed an automated instruction generation process, including constraint expansion, conflict detection, and instruction rewriting, producing 1,200 code-verifiable instruction-following test samples.

name: Multi-IF
intro: Multi-IF是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在多轮和多语言指令遵循能力方面的新基准。该基准通过结合LLM和人工标注者，扩展了IFEval，纳入了多轮对话序列，并将英文提示翻译成其他7种语言。它包含4,501个多语言对话，每个对话有三轮，旨在反映真实世界应用中处理多轮和多语言交互的复杂性。
language: 英文, 中文, 多语言
intro_en: Multi-IF is a new benchmark designed to evaluate large language models (LLMs) on multi-turn and multilingual instruction-following capabilities. By combining LLMs and human annotators, it extends IFEval by incorporating multi-turn dialogue sequences and translating English prompts into seven other languages. It contains 4,501 multilingual dialogues, each with three turns, aiming to reflect the complexity of handling multi-turn and multilingual interactions in real-world applications.

name: Multi-LogiEval
intro: Multi-LogiEval是一个综合性的评测基准，专注于评估大型语言模型的多步逻辑推理能力。该数据集涵盖了命题逻辑、一阶逻辑和非单调逻辑，包含了超过30种推理规则及其60多种组合，并具有不同的推理深度。该基准旨在推动对大型语言模型逻辑推理能力的研究和改进。
org: Arizona State University, Google, Intel, UCSF
intro_en: Multi-LogiEval is a comprehensive benchmark focused on evaluating the multi-step logical reasoning abilities of large language models. The dataset covers propositional logic, first-order logic, and non-monotonic logic, featuring over 30 reasoning rules and more than 60 combinations, with varying reasoning depths. This benchmark aims to advance research and improvement in the logical reasoning capabilities of large language models.

name: Multi-SWE-bench
intro: Multi-SWE-bench是一个多语言基准，旨在评估大型语言模型在解决真实世界软件开发问题上的能力。该基准涵盖了Python、Java、TypeScript、JavaScript、Go、Rust、C和C++等多种编程语言，包含了2132个从实际软件项目中筛选并由专家精心标注的高质量实例。它通过模拟真实开发场景中的问题修复任务，为评估和提升大模型在软件工程领域的应用提供了可靠的平台。
intro_en: Multi-SWE-bench is a multilingual benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' ability to solve real-world software development problems. It covers multiple programming languages, including Python, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Rust, C, and C++, and contains 2,132 high-quality instances carefully curated and annotated by experts from real software projects. By simulating bug-fixing tasks in real development scenarios, it provides a reliable platform for assessing and improving large models' applications in software engineering.

name: MultiChallenge
intro: MultiChallenge是一个开创性的基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在与人类用户进行多轮对话方面的能力。该基准测试识别了多轮对话中常见的四类挑战，这些挑战对当前的前沿LLMs来说都极具难度。MultiChallenge要求LLMs同时具备准确的指令遵循、上下文分配和上下文推理能力。尽管在现有基准测试中表现出色，所有前沿模型在MultiChallenge上的准确率均低于50%。
org: Scale AI, Labelbox, Technical University of Denmark
intro_en: MultiChallenge is a pioneering benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLMs) ability to engage in multi-turn conversations with human users. It identifies four common challenges in multi-turn dialogue that are difficult for state-of-the-art LLMs. MultiChallenge requires LLMs to demonstrate accurate instruction following, context allocation, and context reasoning simultaneously. Despite strong performance on existing benchmarks, all leading models achieve less than 50% accuracy on MultiChallenge.

name: MultiMedQA
intro: MultiMedQA是Google发布的综合性医疗领域AI评测套件，整合了六个现有开放式医疗问答数据集，涵盖专业医学考试、研究和消费者查询，并新增HealthSearchQA数据集，全面评估大型语言模型的临床知识和推理能力。
build_method: 整合现有数据集，部分人工生成
metric: Accuracy, 人工评估（事实性, 精确性, 潜在危害, 偏见）
eval_feature: 整合多数据集，含人工评估事实性、精确性、潜在危害和偏见
scale: 整合多个医疗问答数据集，共约数万题
build_method_en: Integrate existing datasets, partially manually generated
eval_feature_en: Integrate multiple datasets, including human evaluation of factuality, accuracy, potential harm, and bias
intro_en: MultiMedQA is a comprehensive medical AI benchmark released by Google, integrating six existing open-domain medical QA datasets covering professional medical exams, research, and consumer queries, and adding the HealthSearchQA dataset to thoroughly evaluate large language models' clinical knowledge and reasoning abilities.

name: MultiPL-E
intro: MultiPL-E是一个用于将单元测试驱动的代码生成基准测试翻译成新语言的系统。它通过将两个流行的Python代码生成基准测试扩展到18种额外的编程语言，创建了第一个大规模多语言代码生成基准测试。该基准测试用于评估Codex、CodeGen和InCoder等最先进代码生成模型的多语言性能，并探讨语言频率和语言特性对模型性能的影响。
intro_en: MultiPL-E is a system that translates unit test-driven code generation benchmarks into new languages. By extending two popular Python code generation benchmarks to 18 additional programming languages, it creates the first large-scale multilingual code generation benchmark. This benchmark evaluates the multilingual performance of state-of-the-art code generation models such as Codex, CodeGen, and InCoder, and explores the impact of language frequency and language features on model performance.

name: MultiPriv
intro: MultiPriv是系统评估视觉语言模型个体级别隐私推理能力的基准，通过隐私感知与推理框架和双语多模态数据集，涵盖属性检测、跨图像重识别和链式推理等九项挑战性任务。
build_method: 合成个体档案的双语多模态数据集
task_type: 属性检测, 重识别, 链式推理
eval_feature: 评估VLM个体级别隐私推理能力，双语多模态
build_method_en: Bilingual Multimodal Dataset of Synthetic Individual Profiles
eval_feature_en: Evaluating VLM individual-level privacy inference capability, bilingual multimodal
intro_en: MultiPriv is a benchmark for systematically evaluating the individual-level privacy inference capabilities of vision-language models. It features a privacy-aware inference framework and a bilingual multimodal dataset, covering nine challenging tasks including attribute detection, cross-image re-identification, and chain reasoning.

name: MuSR
intro: MuSR（多步软推理）是一个用于评估语言模型多步软推理能力的数据集，任务以自然语言叙述形式呈现。数据集通过新颖的神经符号合成到自然语言生成算法构建，包含复杂推理实例，挑战先进语言模型。实例为自由文本叙述，贴近真实推理场景，兼具挑战性和现实性。
org: New York University, University of Texas at Austin, Princeton University, University of Alberta, AWS
build_method: 神经符号合成到自然语言生成算法
build_method_en: Neuro-symbolic synthesis to natural language generation algorithm
intro_en: MuSR (Multi-step Soft Reasoning) is a dataset designed to evaluate language models' multi-step soft reasoning abilities, with tasks presented in natural language narrative form. The dataset is constructed using a novel neuro-symbolic synthesis to natural language generation algorithm and contains complex reasoning instances that challenge advanced language models. The examples are free-text narratives, closely reflecting real-world reasoning scenarios, combining both challenge and realism.

name: MVBench
intro: MVBench是一个全面的多模态视频理解基准，旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在动态视频任务中的时序理解能力。它涵盖了20项具有挑战性的视频任务，这些任务无法通过单帧有效解决。该基准通过新颖的“静态到动态”方法定义时序相关任务，并自动将公共视频标注转换为多项选择题进行评估。
org: OpenGVLab, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Shenzhen Institutes of Advanced Technology, Chinese Academy of Sc
intro_en: MVBench is a comprehensive multimodal video understanding benchmark designed to evaluate the temporal reasoning abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) on dynamic video tasks. It covers 20 challenging video tasks that cannot be effectively solved using single frames. The benchmark defines temporal reasoning tasks through a novel "static-to-dynamic" approach and automatically converts public video annotations into multiple-choice questions for evaluation.

name: NeedleBench V2
intro: NeedleBench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在不同信息密度下检索与推理能力的合成框架。它通过在长文本中不同深度嵌入关键信息（“针”），来测试模型在信息稀疏和信息密集场景下的表现。该基准包含信息检索和复杂的祖先关系追溯等任务，旨在揭示模型处理长上下文的瓶颈。
task_type: 单/多针检索、多针推理、祖先追溯
task_type_en: Single/multiple probe retrieval, multiple probe inference, ancestor tracing
eval_feature_en: Long text, bilingual, chain of thought
intro_en: NeedleBench is a synthetic framework designed to evaluate large language models' retrieval and reasoning abilities under varying information densities. It tests models by embedding key information ("needles") at different depths within long texts, assessing performance in both sparse and dense information scenarios. The benchmark includes tasks such as information retrieval and complex ancestor tracing, aiming to reveal models' bottlenecks in handling long contexts.

name: NL2Repo-Bench
intro: NL2Repo-Bench是一个旨在评估编码智能体长周期代码仓库生成能力的基准测试。它要求智能体根据自然语言需求文档，自主设计架构、管理依赖、实现多模块逻辑并生成可安装的Python库。实验表明，现有模型在长周期仓库生成方面表现不佳，平均测试通过率低于40%。该基准测试揭示了长周期推理是下一代自主编码智能体的关键瓶颈。
org: Tsinghua University, Beijing Institute of Technology, Peking University, Renmin University of China,
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注, 自动生成
build_method_en: Expert construction, manual annotation, automatic generation
intro_en: NL2Repo-Bench is a benchmark designed to evaluate the long-term code repository generation capabilities of coding agents. It requires agents to autonomously design architecture, manage dependencies, implement multi-module logic, and generate installable Python libraries based on natural language requirement documents. Experiments show that existing models perform poorly in long-term repository generation, with an average test pass rate below 40%. This benchmark reveals that long-term reasoning is a key bottleneck for the next generation of autonomous coding agents.

name: NOVA-63
intro: NOVA-63是一个大规模、学科平衡、原生多语言基准测试，包含14种语言和63个学科的89,107个问题。该基准测试通过LLM辅助格式化、专家质量验证和多级别难度筛选，确保了学科平衡、难度标准一致和语言元素的真实性。对现有LLM的广泛实验揭示了跨语言一致性和模型在不同学科能力上的显著差异。这项工作为多语言模型的未来发展提供了宝贵的基准数据。
org: Peking University, Alibaba Group, Zhejiang University
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注, 自动生成, 混合
build_method_en: Expert construction, manual annotation, automatic generation, hybrid
intro_en: NOVA-63 is a large-scale, discipline-balanced, native multilingual benchmark comprising 89,107 questions across 63 disciplines and 14 languages. The benchmark ensures discipline balance, consistent difficulty standards, and linguistic authenticity through LLM-assisted formatting, expert quality validation, and multi-level difficulty screening. Extensive experiments on existing LLMs reveal cross-lingual consistency and significant variations in model capabilities across different disciplines. This work provides valuable benchmark data for the future development of multilingual models.

name: NYU CTF Bench
intro: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在网络安全领域的夺旗（CTF）挑战解决能力尚未得到充分评估。为解决此问题，本研究开发了一种新颖的方法，通过创建一个可扩展的开源基准数据集来评估LLMs在CTF挑战中的表现。该基准数据集包含来自流行竞赛的各种CTF挑战，并支持LLM测试和自适应学习的元数据。通过提供专门的基准，该项目为开发、测试和完善基于LLM的漏洞检测和解决方案提供了理想平台。
eval_feature: 可扩展, 开源, 动态更新, 过程评估, 工具调用
eval_feature_en: Scalable, open-source, dynamic updates, process evaluation, tool invocation
intro_en: Large language models (LLMs) have not been fully evaluated in their ability to solve cybersecurity capture-the-flag (CTF) challenges. To address this, this study developed a novel approach by creating a scalable open-source benchmark dataset to assess LLM performance on CTF challenges. The benchmark dataset includes various CTF challenges from popular competitions and supports metadata for LLM testing and adaptive learning. By providing a dedicated benchmark, this project offers an ideal platform for developing, testing, and refining LLM-based vulnerability detection and solutions.

name: OCNLI
intro: OCNLI（Original Chinese Natural Language Inference）是首个为中文设计的大规模自然语言推理数据集。该数据集包含约56,000个由语言学专家人工标注的句子对，遵循MNLI的标注协议，旨在为中文自然语言理解的研究提供一个具有挑战性的新基准。
org: Indiana University, Allen Institute for Artificial Intelligence
intro_en: OCNLI (Original Chinese Natural Language Inference) is the first large-scale natural language inference dataset designed for Chinese. It contains approximately 56,000 sentence pairs manually annotated by linguistics experts, following the MNLI annotation protocol, aiming to provide a challenging new benchmark for Chinese natural language understanding research.

name: OCRBench
intro: OCRBench是一个综合性评估基准，旨在评估大型多模态模型的光学字符识别（OCR）能力。它包含29个数据集，涵盖文本识别、场景文本视觉问答、文档视觉问答、关键信息提取和手写数学表达式识别等任务。该基准包含1000个经过人工验证和校正的问题-答案对，以确保评估的准确性。研究揭示了模型在处理多语言文本、手写文本、非语义文本和数学表达式识别方面的优势和劣势。
org: Huazhong University of Science and Technology, Microsoft Research, University of Science and Technol
task_type: 视觉问答, 文本识别, 关键信息提取
task_type_en: Visual Question Answering, Text Recognition, Key Information Extraction
intro_en: OCRBench is a comprehensive evaluation benchmark designed to assess the optical character recognition (OCR) capabilities of large multimodal models. It includes 29 datasets covering tasks such as text recognition, scene text visual question answering, document visual question answering, key information extraction, and handwritten mathematical expression recognition. The benchmark contains 1,000 manually verified and corrected question-answer pairs to ensure evaluation accuracy. Studies reveal the models' strengths and weaknesses in handling multilingual text, handwritten text, non-semantic text, and mathematical expression recognition.

name: OctoBench
intro: OctoBench评估大型语言模型在代码脚手架中遵循指令的能力，特别是在基于代码库的智能体编码场景。包含34个环境和217个任务，配备自动化工具用于细粒度分析任务完成度及规则遵守情况。
org: Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences
intro_en: OctoBench evaluates large language models' ability to follow instructions in code scaffolding, especially in codebase-based agent coding scenarios. It includes 34 environments and 217 tasks, equipped with automated tools for fine-grained analysis of task completion and rule compliance.

name: OJBench
intro: OJBench是一个新颖且具有挑战性的基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型在竞争级代码推理方面的能力。它包含232个来自NOI和ICPC的编程竞赛问题，为模型提供了更严格的推理技能测试。研究表明，即使是最先进的推理导向模型，也难以应对这些高挑战性的问题。这突显了模型在竞争级代码推理方面面临的重大挑战。
org: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, Tsinghua University
intro_en: OJBench is a novel and challenging benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' abilities in competitive-level code reasoning. It includes 232 programming contest problems from NOI and ICPC, providing a more rigorous test of models' reasoning skills. Studies show that even state-of-the-art reasoning-oriented models struggle with these highly challenging problems, highlighting significant challenges in competitive-level code reasoning.

name: olmOCR-bench
intro: olmOCR-Bench是一个用于评估文档提取工具的综合基准，包含1400个PDF文件，涵盖公式、表格、小字体及旧扫描件等多种复杂内容。该基准与开源PDF处理工具olmOCR一同发布，旨在测试OCR系统的多样化能力。
intro_en: olmOCR-Bench is a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating document extraction tools, consisting of 1,400 PDF files featuring complex content such as formulas, tables, small fonts, and old scans. Released alongside the open-source PDF processing tool olmOCR, it aims to test the diverse capabilities of OCR systems.

name: OlympiadBench
intro: OlympiadBench是一个奥林匹克级别的双语多模态科学基准，包含8476道数学和物理竞赛题目，其中包括中国高考题。该基准配备专家级逐步推理注释，旨在评估大型语言模型和多模态模型的高级能力，以应对传统基准日益严峻的挑战。
task_type: 数学问题、开放式问答、定理证明
task_type_en: Mathematical problems, open-ended questions, theorem proving
intro_en: OlympiadBench is an Olympiad-level bilingual multimodal science benchmark containing 8,476 math and physics competition problems, including Chinese Gaokao questions. It features expert-level step-by-step reasoning annotations and aims to evaluate the advanced capabilities of large language models and multimodal models in addressing the increasing challenges of traditional benchmarks.

name: OmniDocBench
intro: OmniDocBench是一个针对多样化PDF文档解析的基准测试，旨在解决现有基准测试中文档类型覆盖范围窄、评估程序简化和不切实际的问题。它提供了高质量的标注，涵盖了学术论文、教科书、手写笔记和密集排版报纸等九种文档来源。该基准支持灵活的多级别评估，从端到端评估到基于任务和属性的分析，使用19种布局类别和15个属性标签。OmniDocBench为文档解析领域公平、多样化和细粒度的评估树立了新标准。
org: OpenDataLab, Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory, University of Hong Kong, Rutgers Business
metric: Normalized Edit Distance, BLEU, METEOR, TEDS, COCODet (mAP, mAR, etc.)
language: 英文, 中文, 多语言
eval_feature: 多级评估, 细粒度评估
scale: 1355个PDF页面, 包含9种文档类型, 20k+块级元素, 80k+跨度级元素
intro_en: OmniDocBench is a benchmark for diverse PDF document parsing, designed to address the narrow document type coverage, simplified evaluation procedures, and impracticality of existing benchmarks. It provides high-quality annotations covering nine document sources, including academic papers, textbooks, handwritten notes, and densely formatted newspapers. The benchmark supports flexible multi-level evaluation, from end-to-end assessment to task- and attribute-based analysis, using 19 layout categories and 15 attribute labels. OmniDocBench sets a new standard for fair, diverse, and fine-grained evaluation in document parsing.

name: OmniMedVQA
intro: OmniMedVQA是一个针对医学领域的大规模综合视觉问答（VQA）基准。它从73个不同的医学数据集中收集，涵盖12种不同的模态和20多个解剖区域。该基准旨在评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在医学领域的表现，并发现现有LVLMs在处理医学VQA问题上的局限性。所有图像均来源于真实的医疗场景，确保了与医疗领域需求的对齐。
org: University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Southeast University
intro_en: OmniMedVQA is a large-scale comprehensive visual question answering (VQA) benchmark for the medical field. It is collected from 73 different medical datasets, covering 12 modalities and over 20 anatomical regions. The benchmark aims to evaluate the performance of large vision-language models (LVLMs) in the medical domain and identify the limitations of existing LVLMs in handling medical VQA tasks. All images are sourced from real medical scenarios, ensuring alignment with healthcare needs.

name: Oolong
intro: Oolong是一个长文本推理基准，包含两个任务集：Oolong-synth和Oolong-real。它要求模型分析单个文本块并聚合这些分析以回答分布问题。即使是前沿模型在128K上下文长度下也难以在此基准上取得高分。
task_type: 分类, 计数, 关系推理, 时间推理
task_type_en: Classification, Counting, Relational Reasoning, Temporal Reasoning
intro_en: Oolong is a long-text reasoning benchmark consisting of two task sets: Oolong-synth and Oolong-real. It requires models to analyze individual text chunks and aggregate these analyses to answer distributional questions. Even state-of-the-art models struggle to achieve high scores on this benchmark with a 128K context length.

name: OpenAI-Proof Q&A
intro: OpenAI-Proof Q&A 评估 AI 模型在 OpenAI 遇到的 20 个内部研究和工程瓶颈上的表现。这些瓶颈每个都代表着一个主要项目至少一天的延迟，在某些情况下还会影响大型训练运行和发布的结果。“OpenAI-Proof”指的是 OpenAI 团队解决每个问题都需要一天以上的时间。任务要求模型诊断和解释复杂问题，例如意外的性能退化、异常的训练指标或细微的实现错误。
intro_en: OpenAI-Proof Q&A evaluates AI models on 20 internal research and engineering bottlenecks encountered at OpenAI. Each bottleneck represents at least a one-day delay in a major project and, in some cases, impacts large-scale training runs and releases. "OpenAI-Proof" refers to the fact that OpenAI teams require more than a day to resolve each issue. The tasks require models to diagnose and explain complex problems, such as unexpected performance degradation, abnormal training metrics, or subtle implementation errors.

name: OpenAudioBench
intro: OpenAudioBench是一个用于评估多模态及音频专用语言模型能力的音频理解评测基准。它包含五个子任务，涵盖逻辑推理、常识问答和开放式问答等多个领域，旨在全面衡量模型的音频理解和“智能”水平。该基准由四个公开数据集和一个由百川智能团队构建的语音逻辑推理数据集组成，共计2701条数据。
build_method: 混合构建（部分源于现有公开数据集，部分由人工构建）
task_type: 开放式问答, 逻辑推理, 常识问答
task_type_en: Open-domain question answering, logical reasoning, common sense question answering
build_method_en: Hybrid construction (partly based on existing public datasets, partly manually constructed)
intro_en: OpenAudioBench is an audio understanding benchmark designed to evaluate the capabilities of multimodal and audio-specific language models. It includes five sub-tasks covering areas such as logical reasoning, commonsense QA, and open-ended QA, aiming to comprehensively assess models' audio understanding and "intelligence" levels. The benchmark consists of four public datasets and one speech logical reasoning dataset created by the Baichuan Intelligence team, totaling 2,701 samples.

name: OpenBookQA
intro: OpenBookQA是一个模拟开卷考试的问答数据集，旨在评估对一个学科的理解能力。该数据集提供一本包含1329个基础科学事实的“开卷”，并提出约6000个问题，这些问题需要结合开卷中的事实和广泛的常识来回答。
intro_en: OpenBookQA is an open-book exam-style QA dataset designed to assess understanding of a subject. It provides an "open book" containing 1,329 basic science facts and poses about 6,000 questions that require combining these facts with broad commonsense knowledge to answer.

name: OpenRCA
intro: OpenRCA是一个基准数据集和评估框架，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）识别软件故障根本原因的能力。该基准包含来自三个企业软件系统的335个故障案例，以及超过68GB的遥测数据（日志、指标和跟踪）。给定一个故障案例及其相关的遥测数据，LLM的任务是识别触发故障的根本原因，这需要理解软件依赖关系并对异构、长上下文遥测数据进行推理。当前模型只能处理最简单的情况，即使是专门设计的RCA-agent，表现最好的模型Claude 3.5也只解决了11.34%的故障案例。
org: The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen, Microsoft, Tsinghua University
intro_en: OpenRCA is a benchmark dataset and evaluation framework designed to assess large language models' (LLMs) ability to identify the root causes of software failures. The benchmark includes 335 failure cases from three enterprise software systems, along with over 68GB of telemetry data (logs, metrics, and traces). Given a failure case and its related telemetry data, the LLM's task is to identify the root cause of the failure, which requires understanding software dependencies and reasoning over heterogeneous, long-context telemetry data. Current models can only handle the simplest cases; even the best-performing RCA-agent, Claude 3.5, solves just 11.34% of the failure cases.

name: OR-Bench
intro: OR-Bench是一个大规模评测LLM过度拒绝现象的基准，包含8万个可能被模型拒绝但无害的提示，以及少量难题和有毒提示。该基准帮助研究者理解并缓解模型过度谨慎拒答无害查询的问题。
intro_en: OR-Bench is a large-scale benchmark for evaluating LLM over-rejection, containing 80,000 prompts that models may reject but are harmless, along with a small number of challenging and toxic prompts. This benchmark helps researchers understand and mitigate the issue of models being overly cautious in refusing harmless queries.

name: OSWorld
intro: OSWorld是一个为多模态智能体设计的可扩展、真实的计算机环境，支持在Ubuntu、Windows和macOS等操作系统上进行任务设置、基于执行的评估和交互式学习。它提供了一个统一的平台，用于评估涉及任意应用程序的开放式计算机任务。该基准包含369个计算机任务，涵盖真实网络和桌面应用、操作系统文件I/O以及跨多个应用程序的工作流。对现有LLM/VLM智能体的评估显示，它们在作为计算机助手方面存在显著不足，人类完成率为72.36%，而最佳模型仅为12.24%。
intro_en: OSWorld is a scalable, realistic computer environment designed for multimodal agents, supporting task setup, execution-based evaluation, and interactive learning on operating systems such as Ubuntu, Windows, and macOS. It provides a unified platform for evaluating open-ended computer tasks involving arbitrary applications. The benchmark includes 369 computer tasks covering real web and desktop applications, OS file I/O, and workflows across multiple applications. Evaluations of existing LLM/VLM agents reveal significant shortcomings as computer assistants, with a human success rate of 72.36% compared to only 12.24% for the best model.

name: OVBench
intro: OVBench是一个综合性的问答基准测试，旨在评估模型在在线视频上下文中感知、记忆和推理的能力。它包含六种核心任务类型，涵盖过去、当前和未来的三种时间上下文，形成来自不同数据集的16个子任务。
org: Nanjing University, China Mobile Research Institute, OpenGVLab, Shanghai AI Laboratory
intro_en: OVBench is a comprehensive question-answering benchmark designed to evaluate models' abilities in perception, memory, and reasoning within online video contexts. It includes six core task types covering past, present, and future temporal contexts, comprising 16 subtasks from various datasets.

name: PaperBench
intro: PaperBench是一个旨在评测AI代理复现顶尖人工智能研究能力的基准。它要求代理从零开始，完整复现20篇ICML 2024的重点论文，涵盖了从理解论文贡献、开发代码到执行实验的全过程。该基准采用一个包含8316个可评分子任务的分层评分体系进行客观评估，并配备了一个基于大型语言模型的自动评分机制以实现规模化评测。
intro_en: PaperBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate AI agents' ability to replicate cutting-edge AI research. It requires agents to fully reproduce 20 key ICML 2024 papers from scratch, covering the entire process from understanding the paper's contributions, developing code, to executing experiments. The benchmark uses a hierarchical scoring system with 8,316 scorable subtasks for objective evaluation and features an LLM-based automatic scoring mechanism for scalable assessment.

name: PathVQA
intro: PathVQA是基于病理图像的视觉问答基准，包含32799个开放式问题和4998张病理图像，通过半自动化流程从病理学教科书和数字图书馆提取，促进医学VQA领域研究。
build_method: 半自动化流水线提取，人工检查
eval_feature: 基于病理图像的视觉问答，开放式和封闭式问题
build_method_en: Semi-automated pipeline extraction with manual inspection
eval_feature_en: Visual Question Answering Based on Pathological Images, Open-ended and Closed-ended Questions
intro_en: PathVQA is a pathology image-based visual question answering benchmark, containing 32,799 open-ended questions and 4,998 pathology images. It is extracted through a semi-automated process from pathology textbooks and digital libraries to advance research in medical VQA.

name: PHYBench
intro: PHYBench是一个旨在全面评估大型语言模型在物理感知和鲁棒推理能力方面的基准测试。它包含500个原创物理问题，难度从高中到物理奥林匹克竞赛不等。PHYBench通过原创内容解决数据污染问题，并采用系统化的筛选流程来消除有缺陷的评估项。评估结果表明，PHYBench能够激活更多的token，并能更好地区分不同推理模型。
org: Tsinghua University, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence (BAAI), Shanghai AI Laboratory, Shan
build_method: 专家构建, 自动生成
eval_feature: 防污染, 思维链, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Anti-contamination, Chain of Thought, Process Evaluation
intro_en: PHYBench is a benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate large language models' physical perception and robust reasoning abilities. It contains 500 original physics problems, ranging in difficulty from high school to Physics Olympiad level. PHYBench addresses data contamination by using original content and employs a systematic screening process to eliminate flawed evaluation items. Results show that PHYBench activates more tokens and better differentiates between reasoning models.

name: PhyX
intro: PhyX是一个大规模基准测试，旨在评估模型在视觉场景中基于物理的推理能力。它包含3000个精心策划的多模态问题，涵盖6种推理类型、25个子领域和6个核心物理领域。评估结果显示，即使是最先进的模型也难以应对，与人类专家相比存在显著差距。该基准测试揭示了当前模型在物理理解方面的局限性，并提供了细致的分析和评估范式。
org: The University of Hong Kong, University of Michigan, Independent, University of Toronto, University
task_type: 多模态问答, 物理推理
eval_feature: 物理推理, 视觉理解, 多模态, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Physical reasoning, visual understanding, multimodal, process evaluation
intro_en: PhyX is a large-scale benchmark designed to evaluate models' physics-based reasoning abilities in visual scenes. It contains 3,000 carefully curated multimodal questions covering 6 reasoning types, 25 subdomains, and 6 core physics areas. Evaluation results show that even state-of-the-art models struggle significantly, with a notable gap compared to human experts. This benchmark reveals current models' limitations in physical understanding and provides detailed analysis and evaluation paradigms.

name: PIQA
intro: PIQA是一个物理常识推理基准，包含多项选择题，测试模型对日常物品使用的理解。旨在评估模型的物理知识水平，推动具备物理世界推理能力的语言理解系统发展。
org: Carnegie Mellon University, Allen Institute for AI, University of Washington, Microsoft Research
intro_en: PIQA is a physical commonsense reasoning benchmark consisting of multiple-choice questions that test a model's understanding of everyday object usage. It aims to evaluate models' physical knowledge and promote the development of language understanding systems with physical world reasoning abilities.

name: PolyMATH
intro: PolyMath是一个多语言数学推理基准，涵盖18种语言和4个难度级别。该基准旨在评估大型语言模型在多语言环境下的数学推理能力，并揭示了LLM在多语言推理中的关键挑战。它通过确保难度全面性、语言多样性和高质量翻译，成为一个具有高度区分度的多语言数学基准。研究发现，即使是先进的LLM也仅能达到约50%的准确率。
eval_feature: 多语言, 难度全面, 高质量翻译
intro_en: PolyMath is a multilingual mathematical reasoning benchmark covering 18 languages and 4 difficulty levels. It aims to evaluate large language models' mathematical reasoning abilities in a multilingual context and highlights key challenges LLMs face in multilingual reasoning. By ensuring comprehensive difficulty, language diversity, and high-quality translations, it serves as a highly discriminative multilingual math benchmark. Studies show that even advanced LLMs achieve only about 50% accuracy.

name: PreScience
intro: PreScience是一个科学预测基准，它将科研过程分解为四个相互依赖的生成式任务：合作者预测、前期工作选择、贡献生成和影响预测。该基准包含一个精心策划的9.8万篇近期AI相关研究论文的数据集，具有消歧的作者身份、时间对齐的学术元数据，以及一个跨越50.2万篇论文的作者出版历史和引用的结构化图谱。
org: Allen Institute for AI, University of Chicago, University of Washington, Google DeepMind
metric: nDCG, R-Precision, LACERScore, ROUGE-L, BERTScore, MAE, Pearson, Spearman
intro_en: PreScience is a scientific prediction benchmark that breaks down the research process into four interdependent generative tasks: collaborator prediction, prior work selection, contribution generation, and impact prediction. The benchmark includes a carefully curated dataset of 98,000 recent AI-related research papers, featuring disambiguated author identities, time-aligned academic metadata, and a structured graph of author publication histories and citations spanning 502,000 papers.

name: ProcBench
intro: ProcBench是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）多步推理能力的基准测试。它通过消除路径探索和隐式知识利用，专注于直接评估多步推理。该数据集包含明确的指令和相应问题对，模型通过遵循提供的指令来解决问题。
org: Ippei Fujisawa, Sensho Nobe, Hiroki Seto, Rina Onda, Yoshiaki Uchida, Hiroki Ikoma, Pei-Chun Chien,
task_type: 指令遵循, 开放式问答
intro_en: ProcBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate the multi-step reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs). By eliminating path exploration and implicit knowledge use, it focuses on directly assessing multi-step reasoning. The dataset contains explicit instructions paired with corresponding questions, and models solve problems by following the given instructions.

name: PromptCBLUE
intro: PromptCBLUE是基于CBLUE重建的中文医疗领域大模型评测基准，评估中文大模型在医疗实体识别、文本分类、自然语言推理、对话理解及内容生成等多任务上的能力，提供在线评测平台。
build_method: 基于CBLUE基准重建，转换为prompt格式
task_type: 多任务（实体识别, 分类, 推理, 对话, 生成）
eval_feature: 评估中文LLM在医疗多任务上的能力，提供在线评测平台
scale: 大规模，覆盖16个医疗NLP任务
task_type_en: Multi-task (entity recognition, classification, reasoning, dialogue, generation)
build_method_en: Reconstructed based on the CBLUE benchmark and converted to prompt format
eval_feature_en: Evaluate the capability of Chinese LLMs on medical multitasks and provide an online evaluation platform
intro_en: PromptCBLUE is a Chinese medical large model evaluation benchmark reconstructed from CBLUE. It assesses the capabilities of Chinese large models across multiple tasks, including medical entity recognition, text classification, natural language inference, dialogue understanding, and content generation, and provides an online evaluation platform.

name: ProntoQA
intro: ProntoQA是一个合成的问答基准，旨在通过基于一阶逻辑的测试用例和思维链来评估大型语言模型的多跳推理能力。该数据集能够将生成的思维链解析为符号证明，以进行形式化分析，从而系统地探究语言模型的推理能力。研究发现，虽然模型在单个演绎步骤上表现良好，但在需要系统探索多个有效选项的证明规划方面存在困难。
intro_en: ProntoQA is a synthetic question-answering benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' multi-hop reasoning abilities through first-order logic-based test cases and chains of thought. The dataset allows generated chains of thought to be parsed into symbolic proofs for formal analysis, enabling a systematic investigation of the models' reasoning capabilities. Studies show that while models perform well on individual deductive steps, they struggle with proof planning that requires systematically exploring multiple valid options.

name: ProtocolQA
intro: ProtocolQA是一个多项选择基准测试，旨在评估模型在解决常见生物实验室方案中失败的实验结果方面的能力。它评估了与生物武器开发相关的两用生物学知识。
org: FutureHouse Inc., University of Washington, Stanford University, Massachusetts Institute of Technolo
build_method: 专家构建, 考试题改编
intro_en: ProtocolQA is a multiple-choice benchmark designed to evaluate models' ability to address failed experimental outcomes in common biological laboratory protocols. It assesses dual-use biological knowledge related to bioweapons development.

name: ProverBench
intro: ProverBench是一个用于评估大型语言模型在形式化定理证明方面能力的基准。它包含325个形式化问题，其中15个问题来自近期的AIME竞赛，旨在全面评估模型在解决高中竞赛级和本科水平数学问题上的能力。该基准由DeepSeek-Prover-V2论文引入，用于测试模型将复杂问题分解为子目标并使用Lean 4等证明器进行验证的能力。
intro_en: ProverBench is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' abilities in formal theorem proving. It contains 325 formal problems, including 15 from the recent AIME competition, designed to comprehensively assess models' capabilities in solving high school competition-level and undergraduate mathematics problems. Introduced by the DeepSeek-Prover-V2 paper, the benchmark tests models' ability to decompose complex problems into subgoals and verify them using provers like Lean 4.

name: PubMedQA
intro: PubMedQA是一个基于PubMed摘要的生物医学问答数据集，任务是用“是”、“否”或“可能”回答研究问题。包含1000个专家标注、61200个未标注及211300个人工生成问答，是首个需对生物医学研究文本进行推理的数据集。
org: University of Pittsburgh, Carnegie Mellon University
build_method: 专家构建、LLM生成、网络爬取、混合
build_method_en: Expert construction, LLM generation, web crawling, hybrid
intro_en: PubMedQA is a biomedical question answering dataset based on PubMed abstracts, where the task is to answer research questions with "yes," "no," or "maybe." It includes 1,000 expert-annotated, 61,200 unlabeled, and 211,300 artificially generated QA pairs, making it the first dataset requiring reasoning over biomedical research texts.

name: RareBench
intro: RareBench是首个系统性评估大语言模型在罕见病领域能力的基准。它包含了多个罕见病患者数据集，并提出了一种动态少样本提示方法来提升诊断性能。该基准还对GPT-4与专业医生的诊断能力进行了比较。
intro_en: RareBench is the first benchmark to systematically evaluate large language models' capabilities in the rare disease domain. It includes multiple rare disease patient datasets and introduces a dynamic few-shot prompting method to enhance diagnostic performance. The benchmark also compares the diagnostic abilities of GPT-4 with those of expert physicians.

name: RealWorldQA
intro: RealWorldQA是一个旨在评估多模态AI模型真实世界空间理解能力的基准测试。它通过700多张真实世界场景（包括车载图像）的图片，配以问题和可验证的答案，来评估模型对物理环境的理解能力。该基准测试要求模型能够识别高分辨率图像中的细节，并基于识别结果进行推理，可能需要常识性知识。
eval_feature: 思维链, 高分辨率图像理解
eval_feature_en: Chain of Thought, High-Resolution Image Understanding
intro_en: RealWorldQA is a benchmark designed to evaluate the real-world spatial understanding capabilities of multimodal AI models. It uses over 700 images of real-world scenes, including in-car images, paired with questions and verifiable answers to assess models' understanding of physical environments. The benchmark requires models to identify details in high-resolution images and perform reasoning based on these observations, potentially involving commonsense knowledge.

name: RefSpatial-Bench
intro: RefSpatial-Bench是一个具有挑战性的基准测试，旨在评估视觉语言模型在多步空间指代推理方面的能力。它基于真实世界中的杂乱场景，并包含大规模的问答对，涵盖了丰富的空间关系和复杂的推理过程。该基准测试填补了现有评估方法在多步空间推理方面的空白，并能有效区分不同模型的性能。
org: Beihang University, Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence
build_method: 混合 (人工标注, 自动生成)
intro_en: RefSpatial-Bench is a challenging benchmark designed to evaluate the ability of vision-language models in multi-step spatial coreference reasoning. It is based on cluttered real-world scenes and includes a large-scale set of question-answer pairs covering rich spatial relationships and complex reasoning processes. This benchmark fills the gap in existing evaluation methods for multi-step spatial reasoning and effectively differentiates the performance of various models.

name: RepoQA
intro: RepoQA是一个旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）长上下文代码理解能力的基准测试。它通过“搜索针函数”（SNF）任务来挑战LLMs，要求模型根据自然语言描述搜索代码函数，这需要模型深入理解代码和描述。RepoQA是多语言且全面的，包含从50个流行代码库中收集的500个代码搜索任务，涵盖5种现代编程语言。
org: University of Washington, Google, ETH Zurich
build_method: 网络爬取, 人工标注
intro_en: RepoQA is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLMs) long-context code understanding ability. It challenges LLMs with the "Search Needle Function" (SNF) task, requiring models to search for code functions based on natural language descriptions, demanding deep comprehension of both code and descriptions. RepoQA is multilingual and comprehensive, containing 500 code search tasks collected from 50 popular code repositories, covering 5 modern programming languages.

name: ReportBench
intro: ReportBench是一个系统性基准，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLMs）生成的学术研究报告的内容质量。该基准关注两个关键维度：引用文献的质量和相关性，以及报告中陈述的忠实性和真实性。它利用arXiv上的高质量已发表综述论文作为黄金标准，通过逆向提示工程构建领域特定提示和评估语料库。
org: ByteDance, Beihang University, The University of Sydney
metric: 内容质量, 引用文献质量和相关性, 陈述忠实性和真实性
intro_en: ReportBench is a systematic benchmark designed to evaluate the content quality of academic research reports generated by large language models (LLMs). It focuses on two key dimensions: the quality and relevance of cited references, and the faithfulness and veracity of statements in the reports. It uses high-quality published survey papers from arXiv as the gold standard and employs reverse prompt engineering to construct domain-specific prompts and evaluation corpora.

name: ResearchRubrics
intro: ResearchRubrics是一个用于评估深度研究（Deep Research）能力的标准化基准。它利用大型语言模型处理开放式研究问题，并通过超过2500条由专家撰写的细粒度评分标准来评估模型的表现。该基准基于超过2800小时的人工劳动构建，包含跨领域的真实研究任务，旨在全面评估模型在事实依据、推理和表达清晰度等方面的能力。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
task_type: 生成, 开放式问答, Agent任务
eval_feature: 结果导向, 思维链, 领域特定
task_type_en: Generation, Open-domain Question Answering, Agent Task
intro_en: ResearchRubrics is a standardized benchmark for evaluating Deep Research capabilities. It leverages large language models to tackle open-ended research questions and assesses model performance using over 2,500 fine-grained scoring criteria authored by experts. Built on more than 2,800 hours of human labor, the benchmark includes cross-domain real research tasks designed to comprehensively evaluate models on factual accuracy, reasoning, and clarity of expression.

name: RewardBench 2
intro: RewardBench 2是一个全新的多技能奖励建模基准，旨在通过提供更具挑战性的数据来推进奖励模型的评估。与第一代相比，模型在RewardBench 2上的得分平均低20分，但与下游任务性能高度相关。该基准使用新的人类提示，而非现有评估中的提示，从而实现了更严格的评估。
org: Allen Institute for AI, Princeton University, University of Washington, ETH AI Center, University of
build_method: 人工标注、众包、LLM生成、混合
build_method_en: Manual annotation, crowdsourcing, LLM generation, hybrid
intro_en: RewardBench 2 is a new multi-skill reward modeling benchmark designed to advance reward model evaluation by providing more challenging data. Compared to the first generation, model scores on RewardBench 2 are on average 20 points lower but show a high correlation with downstream task performance. The benchmark uses new human prompts instead of those from existing evaluations, enabling a more rigorous assessment.

name: Role-play Benchmark
intro: Role-play Benchmark旨在通过情景重现来评估角色扮演代理提供沉浸式体验的能力。它不寻求“正确”答案，而是专注于检测与角色设定不符的“错位”之处，例如逻辑矛盾或脱离角色的行为。
metric: Basics, Logic, Knowledge, Diversity, Content Logic, Interaction
intro_en: The Role-play Benchmark aims to evaluate the ability of role-playing agents to provide immersive experiences through scenario reenactment. It does not seek "correct" answers but focuses on detecting "discrepancies" inconsistent with the character setting, such as logical contradictions or out-of-character behavior.

name: RULER
intro: RULER基准扩展了传统的needle-in-a-haystack测试，旨在全面评估长上下文语言模型。它支持灵活配置序列长度和任务复杂度，涵盖多种“针”（信息）的类型和数量，并引入了多跳追踪与聚合等新任务，用以测试模型超越简单信息检索的行为能力。
intro_en: The RULER benchmark extends the traditional needle-in-a-haystack test to comprehensively evaluate long-context language models. It supports flexible configuration of sequence length and task complexity, covers various types and quantities of "needles" (information), and introduces new tasks like multi-hop tracking and aggregation to assess models' abilities beyond simple information retrieval.

name: SafeArena
intro: SafeArena针对基于LLM的网络代理滥用风险提出首个专注于恶意使用的评测基准。包含250个安全任务和250个有害任务，覆盖四个网站，评估代理在网络环境中的滥用可能性。
metric: Task Completion Rate, Refusal Rate, Normalized Safety Score
intro_en: SafeArena is the first benchmark focused on malicious use risks for LLM-based web agents. It includes 250 safety tasks and 250 harmful tasks across four websites, evaluating the potential for agent misuse in web environments.

name: SafetyBench
intro: SafetyBench是一个综合性的基准测试，用于评估大型语言模型的安全性。它包含11,435个多项选择题，涵盖7个不同的安全问题类别。该基准测试同时包含中文和英文数据，支持两种语言的评估。
eval_feature: 双语, 零样本, 少样本
intro_en: SafetyBench is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate the safety of large language models. It includes 11,435 multiple-choice questions covering seven different categories of safety issues. The benchmark contains both Chinese and English data, supporting evaluation in both languages.

name: SaladBench
intro: SaladBench是一个针对LLM及其攻击防御方法的安全评测基准，规模大、类别丰富、层级复杂且功能多样。它引入了基于LLM的多维评审器MD-Judge，专注于攻击增强查询的问答对，以确保评测的高效与可靠。
build_method: 人工标注、专家构建、LLM生成、混合
metric: Attack Success Rate, Safety Score, LLM-as-Judge
build_method_en: Manual annotation, expert construction, LLM generation, hybrid
intro_en: SaladBench is a security evaluation benchmark for LLMs and their attack-defense methods, featuring large scale, diverse categories, complex hierarchy, and versatile functions. It introduces the LLM-based multidimensional evaluator MD-Judge, focusing on attack-enhanced query QA pairs to ensure efficient and reliable assessment.

name: ScanBench
intro: ScanBench是一个用于评估医疗增强型大型语言模型（LLM）的基准测试。它旨在从被动问答转向主动的临床级决策支持，通过模拟医生的系统工作流程来解决现有系统在开放式咨询中的局限性。该基准测试评估LLM在主动信息获取、长程推理和自适应幻觉抑制方面的能力。
metric: Overall Accuracy, Clinical Inquiry, Advisory, Safety
eval_feature: 主动信息获取, 长程推理, 幻觉抑制
eval_feature_en: Active information acquisition, long-range reasoning, hallucination suppression
intro_en: ScanBench is a benchmark for evaluating medical-enhanced large language models (LLMs). It aims to shift from passive Q&A to proactive clinical-grade decision support by simulating doctors' systematic workflows, addressing limitations of existing systems in open-ended consultations. The benchmark assesses LLMs' abilities in active information retrieval, long-range reasoning, and adaptive hallucination suppression.

name: SciCode
intro: SciCode是一个由科学家策划的编码基准，旨在评估语言模型解决真实科学研究问题的能力。该基准包含从80个主要问题分解出的338个子问题，涵盖数学、物理、化学、生物学和材料科学等16个不同的自然科学子领域。它提供了可选的科学背景信息以及科学家标注的黄金标准解决方案和测试用例。在最真实的设置下，目前最先进的模型Claude3.5-Sonnet只能解决4.6%的问题，表明该基准具有挑战性，并为未来科学AI的发展提供了方向。
org: Argonne National Laboratory, Carnegie Mellon University, Massachusetts Institute of Technology, Prin
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: SciCode is a coding benchmark curated by scientists to evaluate language models' ability to solve real scientific research problems. It consists of 338 subproblems derived from 80 main problems, covering 16 natural science subfields including mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, and materials science. The benchmark provides optional scientific background information along with scientist-annotated gold standard solutions and test cases. Under the most realistic settings, the state-of-the-art model Claude3.5-Sonnet can only solve 4.6% of the problems, highlighting the benchmark's challenge and guiding future development in scientific AI.

name: Scientists' First Exam
intro: Scientists' First Exam (SFE)基准旨在评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的科学认知能力。它通过科学信号感知、科学属性理解和科学比较推理三个相互关联的层面进行评估。SFE包含830个经过专家验证的VQA对，涵盖五大学科的66个多模态任务，旨在弥补现有科学基准在感知和推理能力评估方面的不足。
task_type: 选择题, 开放式问答
intro_en: The Scientists' First Exam (SFE) benchmark aims to evaluate the scientific cognition abilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It assesses three interconnected aspects: scientific signal perception, scientific attribute understanding, and scientific comparative reasoning. SFE includes 830 expert-verified VQA pairs covering 66 multimodal tasks across five major disciplines, designed to address the shortcomings of existing scientific benchmarks in evaluating perception and reasoning capabilities.

name: ScreenSpot
intro: ScreenSpot-Pro是一个新的基准测试，旨在严格评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在专业高分辨率环境中的GUI（图形用户界面）接地能力。该基准包含来自多个专业领域的真实高分辨率图像，并附有专家标注。它涵盖了五大行业和三个操作系统中的23个应用程序。现有GUI接地模型在该数据集上的表现不佳，最佳模型仅达到18.9%。
org: National University of Singapore, ByteDance, University of California Berkeley, University of Illino
eval_feature: 高分辨率, 小目标, 复杂环境
eval_feature_en: High resolution, small targets, complex environment
intro_en: ScreenSpot-Pro is a new benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the GUI grounding capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in professional high-resolution environments. It includes real high-resolution images from multiple specialized fields, annotated by experts. The benchmark covers 23 applications across five major industries and three operating systems. Existing GUI grounding models perform poorly on this dataset, with the best model achieving only 18.9%.

name: SealQA
intro: SealQA是一个新的挑战性基准测试，旨在评估搜索增强型语言模型在事实查询问题上的推理能力。该基准测试的特点是网络搜索结果可能存在冲突、噪音或无用信息。它包含Seal-0、Seal-Hard和LongSeal三种类型，分别侧重于事实准确性、推理能力以及长上下文、多文档推理。
eval_feature: 防污染, 思维链, 过程评估
eval_feature_en: Anti-contamination, Chain of Thought, Process Evaluation
intro_en: SealQA is a new challenging benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning ability of search-augmented language models on factual query tasks. It features web search results that may contain conflicts, noise, or irrelevant information. The benchmark includes three types: Seal-0, Seal-Hard, and LongSeal, focusing respectively on factual accuracy, reasoning ability, and long-context, multi-document reasoning.

name: Sequential-NIAH
intro: Sequential-NIAH是一个专门用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）从长上下文中提取有序信息项（即“针”）能力的基准测试。该基准测试包含三种“针”的生成方式，上下文长度从8K到128K不等，共计14000个样本。为了评估模型表现，研究者训练了一个评估模型，通过比较答案的完整性和顺序一致性来打分，提供了比GPT-4或Claude更可靠的评估指标。
org: Zhejiang University, Ant Group, Tencent Youtu Lab, Beihang University, Cornell University
task_type: 抽取式问答, 开放式问答
task_type_en: Extractive Question Answering, Open-domain Question Answering
intro_en: Sequential-NIAH is a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate large language models' (LLM) ability to extract ordered information items ("needles") from long contexts. It includes three types of "needle" generation methods, with context lengths ranging from 8K to 128K tokens, totaling 14,000 samples. To assess model performance, researchers trained an evaluation model that scores based on answer completeness and order consistency, providing a more reliable metric than GPT-4 or Claude.

name: SHADE-Arena
intro: SHADE-Arena是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）代理在复杂和长期任务中执行隐蔽破坏和监控能力的基准测试。它包含复杂的良性主任务和有害的次要目标对，代理需要在不引起LLM监控器怀疑的情况下完成次要任务。该基准测试旨在衡量LLM代理规避监控和实现有害隐藏目标的能力，并评估监控模型检测此类行为的能力。
intro_en: SHADE-Arena is a benchmark designed to evaluate large language model (LLM) agents' ability to perform covert sabotage and surveillance in complex, long-term tasks. It includes intricate benign primary tasks paired with harmful secondary objectives, where agents must complete the secondary tasks without raising suspicion from LLM monitors. The benchmark aims to measure LLM agents' capability to evade monitoring and achieve harmful hidden goals, as well as to assess monitoring models' effectiveness in detecting such behaviors.

name: SimpleQA
intro: SimpleQA是一个由OpenAI开发的事实性问答基准，旨在评估大型语言模型回答简短、事实明确问题的能力。该基准通过对抗性方式收集，针对GPT-4的回答进行设计，确保问题具有单一且无争议的答案，从而简化评分。SimpleQA旨在测试模型是否能识别其知识边界，避免对不确定的问题做出猜测性回答。
intro_en: SimpleQA is a factual question-answering benchmark developed by OpenAI to evaluate large language models' ability to answer short, fact-based questions. Collected adversarially and designed against GPT-4's responses, it ensures questions have a single, unambiguous answer to simplify scoring. SimpleQA aims to test whether models can recognize their knowledge boundaries and avoid guessing on uncertain questions.

name: SimpleVQA
intro: SimpleVQA是首个全面的多模态基准测试，旨在评估多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）回答自然语言简短问题的真实性能力。它涵盖多任务和多场景，确保高质量和具有挑战性的查询，并维护静态和永恒的参考答案。该基准将视觉问答项目分为9个围绕客观事件或常识的不同任务，并置于9个主题中。通过严格的质量控制和LLM作为评判的评分系统，SimpleVQA对MLLMs的图像理解和文本生成能力进行全面评估。
org: Tsinghua University, Beijing Institute of Technology, Tencent AI Lab, University of Chinese Academy
build_method: 人工标注, 自动生成
intro_en: SimpleVQA is the first comprehensive multimodal benchmark designed to evaluate the factual accuracy of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in answering natural language short questions. It covers multiple tasks and scenarios, ensuring high-quality and challenging queries while maintaining static and permanent reference answers. The benchmark divides visual question answering into 9 tasks focused on objective events or common sense, organized into 9 themes. Through strict quality control and an LLM-based scoring system, SimpleVQA provides a thorough assessment of MLLMs' image understanding and text generation capabilities.

name: SoMe
intro: SoMe是一个开创性的基准测试，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）在社交媒体场景中的能力。该基准包含8个社交媒体代理任务，超过900万条帖子和17,869条精细标注的任务查询，提供了一个多样化且真实的平台。SoMe旨在全面评估社交媒体代理在理解媒体内容、用户行为和做出复杂决策方面的能力。研究表明，无论是闭源还是开源的LLM在处理这些任务时都存在局限性，因此SoMe为未来的社交媒体代理提供了一个富有挑战性的测试平台。
org: University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences
build_method: 网络爬取、人工标注、混合
eval_feature: 动态/实时、多轮、领域特定
intro_en: SoMe is a pioneering benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLM) capabilities in social media scenarios. It includes 8 social media agent tasks, over 9 million posts, and 17,869 finely annotated task queries, offering a diverse and realistic platform. SoMe aims to comprehensively assess social media agents' abilities in understanding media content, user behavior, and making complex decisions. Studies show that both closed-source and open-source LLMs have limitations in handling these tasks, making SoMe a challenging testbed for future social media agents.

name: Spider 2.0
intro: Spider 2.0 是一个包含632个真实企业级数据库文本转SQL工作流问题的评测框架。数据库来自实际应用，常含1000多列，存储于本地或云端如BigQuery和Snowflake。挑战要求模型处理复杂SQL环境、长上下文、多条SQL语句及复杂推理，远超传统文本转SQL任务。
org: xlang.ai, The University of Hong Kong, The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shanghai AI Laboratory,
intro_en: Spider 2.0 is a benchmark consisting of 632 real-world enterprise-level database text-to-SQL workflow problems. The databases originate from practical applications, often containing over 1,000 columns, stored locally or in the cloud such as BigQuery and Snowflake. The challenge requires models to handle complex SQL environments, long contexts, multiple SQL statements, and intricate reasoning, far exceeding traditional text-to-SQL tasks.

name: SpreadsheetBench
intro: SpreadsheetBench是一个具有挑战性的电子表格操作基准，完全来源于真实世界的场景，旨在让当前的大型语言模型（LLMs）沉浸在电子表格用户的实际工作流程中。与依赖合成查询和简化电子表格文件的现有基准不同，SpreadsheetBench由从在线Excel论坛收集的912个真实问题构建而成，这些问题反映了用户错综复杂的需求。相关的电子表格包含多种表格数据，如多表、非标准关系表和丰富的非文本元素。此外，我们提出了一种更可靠的评估指标，类似于在线评测平台，为每个指令创建多个电子表格文件作为测试用例，确保评估能够处理不同值的电子表格的鲁棒解决方案。我们对各种LLMs在单轮和多轮推理设置下的综合评估揭示了最先进（SOTA）模型与人类表现之间存在巨大差距，突显了基准的难度。
org: Renmin University of China, Tsinghua University
eval_feature: 真实世界场景, 鲁棒性评估
intro_en: SpreadsheetBench is a challenging spreadsheet operation benchmark entirely derived from real-world scenarios, designed to immerse current large language models (LLMs) in the actual workflows of spreadsheet users. Unlike existing benchmarks that rely on synthetic queries and simplified spreadsheet files, SpreadsheetBench is built from 912 real questions collected from online Excel forums, reflecting users' complex needs. The associated spreadsheets contain diverse tabular data, including multi-sheet, non-standard relational tables, and rich non-text elements. Additionally, we propose a more reliable evaluation metric, similar to online testing platforms, by creating multiple spreadsheet files as test cases for each instruction to ensure the assessment can handle robust solutions across spreadsheets with varying values. Our comprehensive evaluation of various LLMs under single-turn and multi-turn reasoning settings reveals a significant gap between state-of-the-art (SOTA) models and human performance, highlighting the benchmark’s difficulty.

name: StableToolBench
intro: StableToolBench是一个旨在解决工具学习基准不稳定问题的项目。它通过引入虚拟API服务器和稳定的评估系统，在ToolBench的基础上进行了改进。虚拟API服务器结合了缓存系统和API模拟器，以减轻API状态变化带来的影响；而稳定的评估系统则利用GPT-4作为自动评估器，设计了可解的通过率和获胜率，以消除评估过程中的随机性。
eval_feature: 虚拟API服务器、稳定评估系统
eval_feature_en: Virtual API server, stable evaluation system
intro_en: StableToolBench is a project aimed at addressing the instability issues in tool learning benchmarks. It improves upon ToolBench by introducing a virtual API server and a stable evaluation system. The virtual API server combines a caching system and an API simulator to mitigate the impact of API state changes, while the stable evaluation system uses GPT-4 as an automatic evaluator and designs solvable pass rates and win rates to eliminate randomness in the evaluation process.

name: Step-Audio-Edit
intro: Step-Audio-Edit-Benchmark 是一个用于可控语音合成的综合评测框架，专注于情感、说话风格和副语言等细粒度属性。该基准随 Step-Audio-EditX 模型一同发布，后者是一个基于大语言模型的音频编辑模型。此评测框架的提出旨在解决现有评测方法在全面性上的不足。
org: Shanghai Jieyue Xingchen Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd
intro_en: Step-Audio-Edit-Benchmark is a comprehensive evaluation framework for controllable speech synthesis, focusing on fine-grained attributes such as emotion, speaking style, and paralinguistics. The benchmark is released alongside the Step-Audio-EditX model, an audio editing model based on large language models. This evaluation framework aims to address the limitations of existing methods in terms of comprehensiveness.

name: StrongReject
intro: StrongREJECT是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）越狱攻击的基准。它旨在解决现有越狱研究中普遍存在的夸大攻击效果的问题，提供了一个包含特定、有害信息请求的标准化提示数据集。其核心是一个自动评估器，能够衡量模型响应中提供有害信息的程度，并与人类判断达到很高的吻合度，从而提供更准确、更稳健的越狱有效性评估。
org: Center for Human-Compatible AI, UC Berkeley
intro_en: StrongREJECT is a benchmark for evaluating jailbreak attacks on large language models (LLMs). It aims to address the common issue of exaggerated attack effectiveness in existing jailbreak research by providing a standardized prompt dataset containing specific harmful information requests. At its core is an automatic evaluator that measures the extent of harmful information in model responses and achieves high alignment with human judgments, offering a more accurate and robust assessment of jailbreak effectiveness.

name: SUPERChem
intro: SUPERChem是一个具有挑战性的、由专家策划的多模态基准测试，旨在严格评估大型语言模型（LLMs）和多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）的化学推理能力。它包含500个专家策划的推理密集型化学问题，涵盖不同子领域，并以多模态和纯文本格式提供。该基准测试引入了推理路径保真度（RPF）评分，以评估模型推理的质量，超越了最终答案的准确性。
eval_feature: 多模态, 过程评估, 防污染
intro_en: SUPERChem is a challenging, expert-curated multimodal benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the chemical reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs) and multimodal large language models (MLLMs). It contains 500 expert-curated, reasoning-intensive chemistry questions covering various subfields, presented in both multimodal and pure text formats. The benchmark introduces a Reasoning Path Fidelity (RPF) score to assess the quality of model reasoning beyond final answer accuracy.

name: SuperGPQA
intro: SuperGPQA 是一个全面的评测基准，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）在285个研究生级别学科中的知识和推理能力。该基准通过人机协同过滤机制，消除了简单或模棱两可的问题，从而揭示了当前最先进的LLM在不同知识领域中的性能仍有显著提升空间。SuperGPQA的构建过程涉及80多位专家标注员和一个人机协作系统，为未来大规模研究项目提供了方法论指导。
intro_en: SuperGPQA is a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate large language models' (LLM) knowledge and reasoning abilities across 285 graduate-level disciplines. Using a human-AI collaborative filtering mechanism, it eliminates simple or ambiguous questions, revealing significant room for improvement in state-of-the-art LLMs across various knowledge domains. The construction of SuperGPQA involved over 80 expert annotators and a human-AI collaboration system, providing methodological guidance for future large-scale research projects.

name: SWE-bench
intro: SWE-bench是一个用于评估大型语言模型解决真实世界GitHub问题能力的基准测试。它从12个流行的Python代码库中收集了2294个软件工程问题，每个问题都配有对应的拉取请求和测试补丁。该基准旨在衡量模型在理解代码库、定位问题和生成正确修复方面的能力。
intro_en: SWE-bench is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' ability to solve real-world GitHub issues. It collects 2,294 software engineering problems from 12 popular Python repositories, each paired with corresponding pull requests and test patches. The benchmark aims to assess models' capabilities in understanding codebases, identifying issues, and generating correct fixes.

name: SWE-Bench Pro
intro: SWE-Bench Pro是一个极具挑战性的基准测试，旨在评估人工智能代理在解决长周期、复杂软件工程任务方面的能力。它包含来自41个活跃代码库的1865个问题，真实反映了企业级的开发难题。该基准测试经过精心设计，可有效防止数据污染，从而真实地还原了软件开发的复杂性。
intro_en: SWE-Bench Pro is a highly challenging benchmark designed to evaluate AI agents' ability to solve long-term, complex software engineering tasks. It includes 1,865 problems from 41 active codebases, accurately reflecting enterprise-level development challenges. The benchmark is carefully designed to prevent data contamination, thereby authentically capturing the complexity of software development.

name: SWE-bench Verified
intro: SWE-bench Verified 是SWE-bench的一个人工筛选子集，包含500个实例，由OpenAI合作创建。人工标注者确保问题描述清晰、测试补丁正确且任务可解，提升了原版SWE-bench的可靠性。
build_method: 人工标注、专家构建、网络爬取
build_method_en: Manual annotation, expert construction, web crawling
intro_en: SWE-bench Verified is a manually curated subset of SWE-bench containing 500 instances, created in collaboration with OpenAI. Human annotators ensure clear problem descriptions, correct test patches, and solvable tasks, enhancing the reliability of the original SWE-bench.

name: SWE-bench-Live
intro: SWE-bench-Live是一个实时更新的基准测试，旨在解决现有软件工程基准（如SWE-bench）的静态和手动构建问题。它通过自动化流程从2024年以来的真实GitHub问题中提取任务，并为每个任务提供专用的Docker镜像以确保可复现性。该基准的发布旨在提供一个更动态、多样化和抗污染的评估环境，以促进大型语言模型和智能体在真实软件开发场景中的发展。
intro_en: SWE-bench-Live is a continuously updated benchmark designed to address the static and manual construction issues of existing software engineering benchmarks like SWE-bench. It automatically extracts tasks from real GitHub issues since 2024 and provides dedicated Docker images for each task to ensure reproducibility. The benchmark aims to offer a more dynamic, diverse, and contamination-resistant evaluation environment to advance large language models and agents in real-world software development scenarios.

name: SWE-Evo
intro: 现有针对AI编码代理的基准测试侧重于孤立的、单一问题任务，例如修复错误或添加小功能。然而，现实世界的软件工程本质上是一项长期任务：开发人员必须理解高级需求，协调跨多个文件的更改，并通过多次迭代演进代码库，同时保留现有功能。我们引入了SWE-EVO，这是一个评估代理在此类长期软件演进挑战中的基准。它由七个成熟的开源Python项目的发布说明和版本历史构建，包含48个演进任务，需要代理实现跨平均21个文件的多步骤修改，并通过每个实例平均874个测试的综合测试套件进行验证。实验表明，即使是GPT-5在SWE-EVO上的解决率也仅为21%，而SWE-Bench Verified上的解决率为65%，这表明当前代理在持续的、多文件推理方面存在显著的能力差距。我们还提出了Fix Rate，一个细粒度指标，用于捕获解决这些复杂、长期任务的部分进展。
org: FPT Software AI Center, University of Melbourne, Marvis AI
build_method: 自动生成, 网络爬取
task_type: 代码生成, Agent任务, 开放式问答
scale: 48个演进任务, 7个开源Python项目, 平均21个文件, 每个实例874个测试
task_type_en: Code generation, Agent tasks, Open-domain question answering
intro_en: Existing benchmarks for AI coding agents focus on isolated, single-task problems such as bug fixing or adding small features. However, real-world software engineering is inherently a long-term process: developers must understand high-level requirements, coordinate changes across multiple files, and evolve the codebase through multiple iterations while preserving existing functionality. We introduce SWE-EVO, a benchmark that evaluates agents on such long-term software evolution challenges. It is built from release notes and version histories of seven mature open-source Python projects, comprising 48 evolution tasks that require agents to perform multi-step modifications across an average of 21 files, validated by comprehensive test suites averaging 874 tests per instance. Experiments show that even GPT-5 achieves only a 21% pass rate on SWE-EVO, compared to 65% on SWE-Bench Verified, highlighting a significant capability gap in continuous, multi-file reasoning. We also propose Fix Rate, a fine-grained metric to capture partial progress in solving these complex, long-term tasks.

name: SWE-fficiency
intro: SWE-fficiency是一个用于评估语言模型在真实工作负载下优化存储库级别性能的基准。该基准包含498个任务，涵盖了九个广泛使用的数据科学、机器学习和HPC存储库。在给定完整代码库和缓慢工作负载的情况下，代理必须调查代码语义、定位瓶颈和相关测试，并生成一个能够匹配或超过专家加速效果同时通过相同单元测试的补丁。
org: Harvard University, Google DeepMind, Princeton University, Xi'an Jiaotong University
build_method: 从GitHub PR中自动挖掘和过滤
task_type: 代码优化, 性能工程
eval_feature: 真实世界代码库, 性能优化
build_method_en: Automatically mining and filtering from GitHub PRs
intro_en: SWE-fficiency is a benchmark for evaluating language models' ability to optimize repository-level performance under real-world workloads. It includes 498 tasks across nine widely used data science, machine learning, and HPC repositories. Given the full codebase and a slow workload, the agent must analyze code semantics, identify bottlenecks and relevant tests, and generate a patch that matches or surpasses expert-level acceleration while passing the same unit tests.

name: SWE-Lancer
intro: SWE-Lancer收录了超过1400个来自Upwork的自由职业软件工程任务，实际支付总额达100万美元。该基准测试涵盖了从50美元的错误修复到32000美元的功能实现等独立的工程任务，以及模型需要选择技术实施方案的管理任务。通过端到端测试和与人类管理者决策的对比来评估模型的表现，旨在促进对人工智能模型经济影响的研究。
intro_en: SWE-Lancer includes over 1,400 freelance software engineering tasks from Upwork, with a total payment exceeding $1 million. The benchmark covers independent engineering tasks ranging from $50 bug fixes to $32,000 feature implementations, as well as management tasks where models must choose technical implementation plans. Model performance is evaluated through end-to-end testing and comparison with human manager decisions, aiming to advance research on the economic impact of AI models.

name: SWE-PolyBench
intro: SWE-PolyBench是一个多语言基准，用于评估大型语言模型在多种编程语言和真实场景下的软件工程任务表现。它包含来自21个代码仓库的2110个实例，涵盖Java、JavaScript、TypeScript和Python，任务包括修复漏洞、添加功能和代码重构。
build_method: 专家构建、网络爬取、混合
metric: Resolve Rate, Pass Rate, Syntax Tree Analysis
intro_en: SWE-PolyBench is a multilingual benchmark designed to evaluate large language models on software engineering tasks across various programming languages and real-world scenarios. It includes 2,110 instances from 21 code repositories, covering Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Python, with tasks such as bug fixing, feature addition, and code refactoring.

name: SWE-Sharp-Bench
intro: SWE-Sharp-Bench是一个针对C#语言的可复现软件工程基准测试。它包含了从17个真实世界的C#代码仓库中精心挑选的150个软件工程任务实例，填补了现有基准测试中对C#语言支持的空白。该基准的评估结果揭示了当前AI编码代理在处理C#任务时，其性能显著低于处理Python任务，显示出明显的性能差距。
build_method: 专家构建, 网络爬取, 混合
eval_feature: 结果导向, 领域特定
intro_en: SWE-Sharp-Bench is a reproducible software engineering benchmark for the C# language. It includes 150 software engineering task instances carefully selected from 17 real-world C# code repositories, filling the gap in existing benchmarks for C# support. Evaluation results reveal that current AI coding agents perform significantly worse on C# tasks compared to Python tasks, showing a clear performance gap.

name: SysBench
intro: SysBench是一个用于系统性分析大型语言模型（LLM）遵循系统消息能力的基准。它主要通过三个方面来评估现有LLM的局限性：约束违规、指令误判和多轮不稳定性。该基准包含500个基于六种常见约束类型手工构建的系统消息和多轮用户对话，覆盖了多样的交互关系。
metric: Constraint Violation Rate, Instruction Misjudgment Rate, Multi-turn Instability Rate
intro_en: SysBench is a benchmark for systematically analyzing large language models' (LLM) ability to follow system messages. It evaluates existing LLMs' limitations through three aspects: constraint violations, instruction misinterpretation, and multi-turn instability. The benchmark includes 500 system messages and multi-turn user dialogues manually constructed based on six common constraint types, covering diverse interaction scenarios.

name: T-Eval
intro: T-Eval系统地分解大型语言模型的工具使用能力，涵盖指令遵循、规划、推理、检索、理解和复审等子过程。基于此，提出了逐步评估工具利用能力的T-Eval基准，填补了对工具使用细节分析的空白。
org: University of Science and Technology of China, Shanghai AI Laboratory, Tsinghua University, Jilin Un
metric: Planning, Reasoning, Retrieval, Understanding, Instruction Following, Review
intro_en: T-Eval systematically breaks down the tool-using capabilities of large language models, covering subprocesses such as instruction following, planning, reasoning, retrieval, comprehension, and review. Based on this, the T-Eval benchmark was proposed for step-by-step evaluation of tool utilization abilities, filling the gap in detailed analysis of tool usage.

name: TACO
intro: TACO是一个开源的大规模代码生成数据集，专注于算法的光学，旨在为代码生成模型领域提供更具挑战性的训练数据集和评估基准。TACO包含具有挑战性的竞赛级编程问题，以增强或评估在实际编程场景中的问题理解和推理能力。每个TACO问题都包含任务主题、算法、编程技能和难度级别等细粒度标签，为代码生成模型的训练和评估提供了更精确的参考。
org: ByteDance, Shanghai AI Lab, The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, Tsinghua University,
scale: 25433个训练问题，1000个测试问题，多达155万个解决方案
intro_en: TACO is an open-source large-scale code generation dataset focused on algorithm optics, designed to provide more challenging training data and evaluation benchmarks for code generation models. TACO includes challenging competition-level programming problems to enhance or assess problem understanding and reasoning abilities in real-world programming scenarios. Each TACO problem contains fine-grained labels such as task topic, algorithm, programming skills, and difficulty level, offering more precise references for training and evaluating code generation models.

name: TAU-Bench
intro: TAU-Bench是一个用于评估语言代理在真实世界领域中与工具、代理和用户交互的基准。它通过模拟用户（由语言模型扮演）和配备了特定领域API工具及策略指南的语言代理之间的动态对话来进行。该基准采用一种高效且可靠的评估方法，通过比较对话结束时的数据库状态与预设的注释目标状态来评分，并引入了pass@k指标来衡量代理在多次试验中的行为可靠性。
intro_en: TAU-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating language agents interacting with tools, agents, and users in real-world domains. It simulates dynamic dialogues between users (played by language models) and language agents equipped with domain-specific API tools and policy guidelines. The benchmark uses an efficient and reliable evaluation method by scoring based on the database state at the end of the dialogue compared to predefined annotated target states, and introduces the pass@k metric to measure agent behavior reliability across multiple trials.

name: TAU2Bench
intro: τ²-Bench是一个用于评估在双控环境中对话式AI代理的基准。与现有基准不同，它模拟了AI代理和用户都能使用工具与共享动态环境交互的真实场景。该基准包含一个新颖的电信双控域，一个可程序化创建多样化任务的组合任务生成器，以及一个与环境紧密耦合的可靠用户模拟器。实验表明，从单用户控制到双用户控制的转变会导致代理性能显著下降，这凸显了指导用户所面临的挑战。
org: Sierra, University of Southern California, University of Toronto, UCLA, Princeton University
task_type: 对话式任务, 工具调用
eval_feature: 双控环境, 人机协作, 动态环境
scale: 4个领域、12个工具集、75个任务模板
eval_feature_en: Dual-control environment, human-machine collaboration, dynamic environment
intro_en: τ²-Bench is a benchmark for evaluating conversational AI agents in dual-control environments. Unlike existing benchmarks, it simulates realistic scenarios where both AI agents and users can interact with a shared dynamic environment using tools. The benchmark features a novel telecom dual-control domain, a compositional task generator for programmable diverse tasks, and a reliable user simulator tightly coupled with the environment. Experiments show that shifting from single-user control to dual-user control significantly degrades agent performance, highlighting the challenges in guiding users.

name: TempCompass
intro: TempCompass是一个旨在全面评估视频大语言模型（Video LLMs）时间感知能力的基准测试。现有基准未能区分不同的时间维度，且任务形式单一。TempCompass通过引入多样化的时间维度和任务形式，并采用构建冲突视频和LLM生成指令的策略来收集高质量数据。该基准揭示了当前Video LLMs在时间感知能力上的不足。
org: Tsinghua University, Peking University, Tencent AI Lab, The Hong Kong University of Science and Tech
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题
intro_en: TempCompass is a benchmark designed to comprehensively evaluate the temporal awareness of Video LLMs. Existing benchmarks fail to differentiate between various temporal dimensions and have limited task formats. TempCompass addresses this by introducing diverse temporal dimensions and task types, and by using strategies such as constructing conflicting videos and generating instructions with LLMs to collect high-quality data. This benchmark reveals the current shortcomings of Video LLMs in temporal understanding.

name: Terminal Bench 2
intro: terminal-bench-2-verified是Terminal-Bench 2.0的改进版，评估AI智能体在命令行环境下执行任务的能力。该版本修正了环境不一致和指令模糊等问题，提供更可靠的终端场景能力评测。它由89个在计算机终端环境中、受真实工作流启发的难题组成。
org: Zhipu AI, Anthropic, Laude Institute, University of Washington, Google
eval_feature: 过程导向、真实世界任务
intro_en: terminal-bench-2-verified is an improved version of Terminal-Bench 2.0 that evaluates AI agents' ability to perform tasks in command-line environments. This version addresses issues like environment inconsistency and ambiguous instructions, providing a more reliable assessment of terminal scenario capabilities. It consists of 89 challenges inspired by real workflows in computer terminal environments.

name: TestExplora
intro: TestExplora是一个评估大型语言模型作为主动测试者能力的基准，包含2389个任务，覆盖482个代码仓库。模型需通过对比代码实现与文档意图发现漏洞，填补了当前评测中缺乏主动漏洞发现能力的空白。
build_method: 基于真实世界数据、自动生成
build_method_en: Based on real-world data, automatically generated
intro_en: TestExplora is a benchmark for evaluating large language models as proactive testers, comprising 2,389 tasks across 482 code repositories. Models are required to identify vulnerabilities by comparing code implementations with documentation intent, addressing the current gap in active vulnerability detection capabilities.

name: TiC-LM
intro: TiC-LM 是一个用于时间连续语言模型预训练的网络规模基准。它包含一个源自114个Common Crawl（CC）数据转储的大规模时间分层数据集，比以前的基准大几个数量级。该基准还设计了跨通用领域（CC数据）和特定领域（维基百科、StackExchange和代码文档）的时间分层评估，以评估持续学习方法在适应新数据的同时保留过去知识的能力。
metric: held-out loss, Perplexity, Forgetting, Forward Transfer
intro_en: TiC-LM is a network scale benchmark for pretraining time-continuous language models. It includes a large-scale time-layered dataset derived from 114 Common Crawl (CC) data dumps, several orders of magnitude larger than previous benchmarks. The benchmark also features time-layered evaluations across general domains (CC data) and specific domains (Wikipedia, StackExchange, and code documentation) to assess continual learning methods' ability to retain past knowledge while adapting to new data.

name: ToM-Bench
intro: ToM-Bench是一个系统的、自动化的、原创的双语心智理论（ToM）基准，旨在评估大型语言模型（LLM）的ToM能力。它包含一个涵盖8个任务和31个社会认知能力的评估框架，采用多项选择题格式以支持自动化和无偏见的评估，并从头开始构建双语清单以避免数据泄漏。
eval_feature: 多轮、长文本、结果导向、领域特定
intro_en: ToM-Bench is a systematic, automated, and original bilingual Theory of Mind (ToM) benchmark designed to evaluate the ToM capabilities of large language models (LLMs). It features an evaluation framework covering 8 tasks and 31 social cognitive abilities, uses multiple-choice questions to enable automated and unbiased assessment, and is built from scratch with a bilingual checklist to prevent data leakage.

name: TOMATO
intro: 我们引入了TOMATO，一个时间推理多模态评估基准，旨在严格评估多模态基础模型（MFMs）在视频理解中的时间推理能力。TOMATO包含1,484个精心策划、人工标注的问题，涵盖六项任务，应用于1,417个视频，包括805个自录和自生成视频。我们的综合评估揭示了最佳模型与人类之间57.3%的性能差距，并揭示了当前MFMs在解释连续视频序列方面的基本局限性。我们相信TOMATO将成为评估下一代MFMs的关键测试平台，并呼吁社区开发能够通过视频模态理解人类世界动态的AI系统。
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 思维链
eval_feature_en: Dynamic updating, contamination prevention, chain of thought
intro_en: We introduce TOMATO, a temporal reasoning multimodal benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the temporal reasoning capabilities of multimodal foundation models (MFMs) in video understanding. TOMATO contains 1,484 carefully curated and manually annotated questions across six tasks, applied to 1,417 videos, including 805 self-recorded and self-generated videos. Our comprehensive evaluation reveals a 57.3% performance gap between the best models and humans, highlighting fundamental limitations of current MFMs in interpreting continuous video sequences. We believe TOMATO will become a key testing platform for evaluating the next generation of MFMs and call on the community to develop AI systems capable of understanding human world dynamics through video modalities.

name: Toolathlon
intro: Toolathlon是一个用于评估语言代理在多样化、真实和长视域任务中性能的基准测试。它涵盖了32个软件应用和604个工具，从日常平台（如Google日历和Notion）到专业平台（如WooCommerce、Kubernetes和BigQuery）。该基准测试包含108个手动来源或制作的任务，平均需要约20轮交互才能完成。
org: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, All Hands AI, Carnegie Mellon University, Duke U
task_type: 多步工作流, 软件应用交互
eval_feature: 长视域任务, 真实环境
intro_en: Toolathlon is a benchmark for evaluating language agents' performance on diverse, realistic, and long-horizon tasks. It covers 32 software applications and 604 tools, ranging from everyday platforms like Google Calendar and Notion to professional platforms such as WooCommerce, Kubernetes, and BigQuery. The benchmark includes 108 manually sourced or created tasks, each requiring an average of about 20 interaction rounds to complete.

name: ToolSandbox
intro: ToolSandbox是一个用于评估大型语言模型（LLM）在有状态、对话式和交互式场景中工具使用能力的基准。它包含状态化的工具执行、工具间的隐式状态依赖，以及一个支持策略性对话评估的内置用户模拟器。该基准旨在揭示开源与专有模型在处理状态依赖、规范化及信息不足等复杂任务时的性能差距。
intro_en: ToolSandbox is a benchmark for evaluating large language models' (LLM) ability to use tools in stateful, conversational, and interactive scenarios. It includes stateful tool execution, implicit state dependencies between tools, and a built-in user simulator that supports strategic dialogue evaluation. The benchmark aims to reveal performance gaps between open-source and proprietary models in handling complex tasks involving state dependencies, normalization, and information insufficiency.

name: TreeBench
intro: TreeBench是一个诊断性基准测试，旨在评估多模态AI模型在视觉基础推理方面的能力。它基于三个原则构建：复杂场景中细微目标的视觉感知、通过边界框评估的可追溯证据以及超越简单目标定位的二阶推理。该基准包含405个具有挑战性的视觉问答对，即使是最先进的模型也难以达到60%的准确率。
org: Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, Byt
build_method: 人工标注, 专家构建, 混合
intro_en: TreeBench is a diagnostic benchmark designed to evaluate multimodal AI models' capabilities in visual fundamental reasoning. It is built on three principles: visual perception of subtle objects in complex scenes, traceable evidence assessed through bounding boxes, and second-order reasoning beyond simple object localization. The benchmark includes 405 challenging visual question-answer pairs, with even state-of-the-art models struggling to achieve 60% accuracy.

name: TrialBench
intro: TrialBench是一个综合性多模态AI就绪临床试验数据集套件，包含23个精心策划的数据集，涵盖多模态输入特征和8个关键预测挑战，旨在推动临床试验设计中先进AI方法的发展。
build_method: 人工策展，整合临床试验数据
eval_feature: 涵盖多模态输入特征和8个关键预测挑战
build_method_en: Artificial curation, integration of clinical trial data
eval_feature_en: Covering multimodal input features and 8 key prediction challenges
intro_en: TrialBench is a comprehensive multimodal AI-ready clinical trial dataset suite, comprising 23 carefully curated datasets that cover multimodal input features and 8 key prediction challenges, aimed at advancing state-of-the-art AI methods in clinical trial design.

name: TroubleshootingBench
intro: TroubleshootingBench是一个用于评估模型识别和纠正生物协议中实际错误能力的基准测试。它包含一个由专家编写的湿实验室程序故障排除数据集，侧重于隐含知识和未在线发布的未受污染程序。该数据集包括52个协议，每个协议都配有三个专家编写的故障排除问题，旨在测试模型在非公开、基于经验的协议和依赖于隐性程序知识的错误上的表现。
build_method: 专家构建, 人工标注
intro_en: TroubleshootingBench is a benchmark designed to evaluate models' ability to identify and correct real errors in biological protocols. It includes a dataset of wet lab protocol troubleshooting cases written by experts, focusing on implicit knowledge and unpublished, uncontaminated protocols. The dataset contains 52 protocols, each paired with three expert-crafted troubleshooting questions, aimed at testing model performance on non-public, experience-based protocols and errors relying on implicit procedural knowledge.

name: TrustLLM
intro: TrustLLM是一项关于LLM可信度的综合研究，提出涵盖八个维度的可信原则，并基于此建立包含真诚性、安全性、公平性、鲁棒性、隐私及机器伦理等六个维度的评测基准。研究评估了16个主流LLM，涉及30多个数据集。
org: Linköping University, University of Copenhagen, Alexandra Institute, Norwegian University of Science
build_method: 混合、人工标注、专家构建、网络爬取
metric: Accuracy, F1, BLEU, ROUGE, Perplexity, LLM-as-Judge
task_type: 选择题、开放式问答、分类、生成
task_type_en: Multiple choice, open-ended question, classification, generation
build_method_en: Hybrid, manual annotation, expert construction, web crawling
intro_en: TrustLLM is a comprehensive study on LLM trustworthiness, proposing trust principles across eight dimensions and establishing an evaluation benchmark covering six dimensions: sincerity, safety, fairness, robustness, privacy, and machine ethics. The study assesses 16 mainstream LLMs using over 30 datasets.

name: TruthfulQA
intro: TruthfulQA基准用于衡量语言模型回答问题时的真实性。它包含817个问题，涵盖38个类别，旨在诱导模型产生基于常见人类误解的错误答案，从而促使模型避免重复网络文本中的虚假信息。
metric: Accuracy, BLEURT, ROUGE, BLEU, GPT-judge, GPT-info
task_type: 开放式问答, 选择题
intro_en: The TruthfulQA benchmark measures the truthfulness of language models' answers. It contains 817 questions across 38 categories, designed to induce models to produce errors based on common human misconceptions, thereby encouraging them to avoid repeating false information found in web text.

name: TVBench
intro: TVBench是一个新颖的开源视频多项选择问答基准，旨在评估视频语言模型中的时间理解能力。它通过设计具有时间挑战性的候选答案、减少文本偏见以及排除需要先验知识的问题来解决现有视频语言基准的局限性。TVBench要求模型高度依赖时间理解，而非静态信息或世界知识。
org: University of Santiago de Compostela, University of Amsterdam, University of Technology Nuremberg
eval_feature: 动态更新, 防污染, 思维链
eval_feature_en: Dynamic updating, contamination prevention, chain of thought
intro_en: TVBench is a novel open-source video multiple-choice question answering benchmark designed to evaluate temporal understanding in video language models. It addresses limitations of existing video language benchmarks by creating temporally challenging candidate answers, reducing textual biases, and excluding questions requiring prior knowledge. TVBench demands models rely heavily on temporal understanding rather than static information or world knowledge.

name: Vending Bench
intro: Vending-Bench是一个模拟环境，旨在测试基于LLM的Agent在长期运行的业务场景中保持连贯性的能力。该基准要求Agent管理自动售货机，包括平衡库存、下订单、定价和处理日常费用。实验表明，LLM在长期任务中的表现差异很大，一些模型能够盈利，但所有模型都可能因误解交付计划或遗忘订单而失败。该基准有助于评估AI系统在复杂、长期决策中的持续连贯性。
metric: 盈利能力, 任务完成率
intro_en: Vending-Bench is a simulated environment designed to test the ability of LLM-based Agents to maintain coherence in long-running business scenarios. The benchmark requires Agents to manage vending machines, including balancing inventory, placing orders, pricing, and handling daily expenses. Experiments show significant performance variation among LLMs in long-term tasks; some models can turn a profit, but all may fail due to misunderstanding delivery schedules or forgetting orders. This benchmark helps evaluate AI systems' sustained coherence in complex, long-term decision-making.

name: VIBE
intro: VIBE是MiniMax推出的新基准，旨在衡量模型从零开始构建完整、可运行应用的全栈能力。它采用“Agent-as-a-Verifier” (AaaV) 范式，在真实的执行环境中自动评估应用的交互逻辑和视觉呈现，覆盖了Web、移动端（Android/iOS）、后端和科学模拟等多个领域。
org: Institute of Automation, Chinese Academy of Sciences, University of Chinese Academy of Sciences
metric: 执行、交互和视觉/美学层
eval_feature: 过程导向、结果导向、领域特定
